lines: prayacchec ced bhṛtiṃ svāmī bhṛtyānāṃ karma kurvatām
na kurvanti ca bhṛtyāś cet tatra vādaḥ pravartate
hiṃsāṃ vā kurute kaś cid deyaṃ vā na prayacchati
dve hi sthāne vivādasya tayor bahutarā gatiḥ
yato dravyaṃ vinikrīya ṛṇārthaṃ caiva gṛhyate
tejomātraṃ samuddhṛtya rājño mūrtir hi nirmitā
tasya savāṇi bhūtāni carāṇi sthāvarāṇi ca
bhayād bhogāya kalpante svadharmān na calanti ca
tasmād varṇāśramāṇāṃ tu netāsau nirmitaḥ purā
pāruṣye dve vadhaś caiva parastrīsaṃgrahas tathā
pāruṣye dve sāhasaṃ ca parastrīsaṃgrahas tathā
viśeṣa eṣāṃ nirdiṣṭaś caturṇām apy anukramāt
mūlaṃ sarvavivādānāṃ ye vidus te parīkṣakāḥ
pūrvapakṣaḥ smṛtaḥ pādo dvitīyas tūttaras tathā
kriyāpādas tathā vācyaś caturtho nirṇayas tathā
śāstraṃ kevalam āśritya kriyate yatra nirṇayaḥ
vyavahāraḥ sa vijñeyo dharmas tenāpi vardhate
kriyate nirṇayas tatra vyavahāras tu bādhyate
vihāya caritācāraṃ yatra kuryāt punar nṛpaḥ
nirṇayaṃ sā tu rājājñā caritaṃ bādhyate tayā
saptaprakṛtikaṃ yat tu vijigīṣor areś ca yat
prātar utthāya nṛpatiḥ śaucaṃ kṛtvā vidhānataḥ
gurūn jyotirvido vaidyān devān viprān purohitān
abhinandya ca gurvādīn sumukhaḥ praviśet sabhām
rājā kāryāṇi saṃpaśyet sadbhir eva tribhir vṛtaḥ
sabhām eva praviśyāgryām āsīnaḥ sthita eva vā
yantrāyudhaiś ca vividhaiḥ snigdhaiḥ śūrair narair yutam
āhṛtya sthāpayet tatra teṣāṃ vṛttiṃ prakalpayet
muktā bhāvyāś ca nṛpater lekhayitvā svaśāsane
nityaṃ naimittikaṃ kāmyaṃ śāntikaṃ pauṣṭikaṃ tathā
paurāṇāṃ karma kuryus te saṃdigdhavinayaṃ tathā
samā nimnonnatā vāpi yatra bhūmir yathāvidhā
samantāt tatra veśmāni kuryuḥ prakṛtayas tataḥ
guṇavān iti yaḥ proktaḥ khyāpito janasaṃsadi
tasmāt prabhutvaṃ vṛttiṃ ca nirdoṣasya na cālayet
samyaṅ niviṣṭadeśas tu kṛtadurgas tu śāstrataḥ
yad adhīte yad yajate yaj juhoti yad arcati
tasya ṣaḍbhāgabhāg rājā samyag bhavati rakṣaṇāt
rakṣan dharmeṇa bhūtāni rājā vadhyāṃś ca ghātayan
audakaṃ pārvataṃ vārkṣyam airaṇaṃ dhānvanaṃ tathā
prāgdiśi prāṅmukhīṃ tasya lakṣaṇyāṃ kalpayet sabhām
ajeyatvaṃ lokapaṅktiḥ svarge sthānaṃ ca śāśvatam
tasmān nyāyena rājā tu samyag yatnena pālayet
tasmād arthaṃ ca rājyaṃ ca [yaśaś ca] vipulaṃ labhet
satyaṃ devāḥ samāsena manuṣyās tv anṛtaṃ viduḥ
ihaiva tasya devatvaṃ yasya satye sthitā matiḥ
tadyuktiyogād yo 'rtheṣu nirṇaye na sa daṇḍabhāk
caturvidhā sabhā proktā sabhyāś caiva tathāvidhāḥ

sabhyāḥ
	    lokavedāṅgadharmajñāḥ sapta pañca trayo 'pi vā
etad daśāṅgaṃ karaṇaṃ yasyām adhyāsta pārthivaḥ
sa kālo vyavahārāṇāṃ śāstradṛṣṭaḥ paraḥ smṛtaḥ
sapta pañca trayo vā sabhāsado bhavanti
rājā kāryāṇi saṃpaśyet prāḍvivāko 'tha vā dvijaḥ
ekas tv anekadhā prokto vyavahāro manīṣibhiḥ
tasya nirṇayakṛd rājā brāhmaṇaś ca bahuśrutaḥ
vyavahārāśritaṃ praśnaṃ pṛcchati prāḍ iti śrutiḥ
vivadet tatra yas tasmin prāḍvivākas tu sa smṛtaḥ
vivāde pṛcchati praśnaṃ pratipraśnaṃ tathaiva ca
priyapūrvaṃ prāg vadati prāḍvivākas tataḥ smṛtaḥ
sasabhyaḥ prekṣako rājā svarge tiṣṭhati dharmataḥ
vipraṃ prājñaṃ kramāyātam amātyaṃ sthāpayed dvijam
dvijān vihāya yaḥ paśyet kāryāṇi vṛṣalaiḥ saha
tasya prakṣarate rāṣṭraṃ balaṃ kośaṃ ca naśyati
ye cāraṇyacarās teṣām araṇye karaṇaṃ bhavet
senāyāṃ sainikānāṃ tu sārtheṣu baṇijāṃ tathā
liṅginas taskarāś caiva svena dharmeṇa nirṇayaḥ
kulāni śreṇayaś caiva gaṇās tv adhikṛto nṛpaḥ
tapasvināṃ tu kāryāṇi traividyair eva kārayet
adaṇḍyān daṇḍayan rājā daṇḍyāṃś caivāpy adaṇḍayan
ayaśo mahad āpnoti narakaṃ caiva gacchati
api bhrātā suto 'rghyo vā śvaśuro māturo 'pi vā
nādaṇḍyo nāma rājño 'sti dharmād vicalitaḥ svakāt
yatra vipro na vidvān syāt kṣatriyaṃ tatra yojayet
vaiśyaṃ vā dharmaśāstrajñaṃ śūdraṃ yatnena varjayet
sabhyādhīnaḥ satyavādī kartavyas tu sa pūruṣaḥ
eṣāṃ mūrdhā nṛpo 'ṅgānāṃ mukhaṃ cādhikṛtaḥ smṛtaḥ
bāhū sabhyāḥ smṛtir hastau jaṅghe gaṇakalekhakau
hemāgnyambudṛśau hṛc ca pādau svapuruṣas tathā
hiraṇyam agnim udakaṃ dharmaśāstrāṇi caiva hi
tanmadhye sthāpayed rājā puṇyāni ca hitāni ca
daśānām api caiteṣāṃ karma proktaṃ pṛthak pṛthak
smṛtir vinirṇayaṃ brūte jayadānaṃ damaṃ tathā
gaṇako gaṇayed arthaṃ likhen nyāyaṃ ca lekhakaḥ
vāgdaṇḍaś caiva dhigdaṇḍo viprādhīnau tu tāūbhau
vicārya śreṇibhiḥ kāryaṃ kulair yan na vicāritam
gaṇaiś ca śreṇy avijñātaṃ gaṇājñātaṃ niyuktakaiḥ
sarveṣām adhiko rājā dharmaṃ yatnena niścitam
iha kīrtiṃ rājapūjāṃ labhate svargatiṃ ca saḥ
upekṣamāṇās te bhūpā narakaṃ yānty adhomukhāḥ
nyāyamārgād apetaṃ tu jñātvā cittaṃ mahīpateḥ
vaktavyaṃ tv apriyaṃ tatra na sabhyaḥ kilbiṣī tataḥ
śṛṇoti yadi no rājā syāt tu sabhyas tato 'naghaḥ
prāḍvivāko 'pi daṇḍyaḥ syāt sabhyāś caiva viśeṣataḥ
snetāc cājñānato vāpi mohād vā lobhato 'pi vā
yatra sabhyo 'nyathāvādī daṇḍyo 'sabhyaḥ smṛto hi saḥ
lekhyaṃ yatra na vidyeta na sākṣī na ca bhuktayaḥ
pramāṇāni na santy ekaṃ pramāṇaṃ tatra pārthivaḥ
niścetuṃ ye na śakyāḥ syur vādāḥ saṃdigdharūpiṇaḥ
teṣāṃ nṛpaḥ pramāṇ aṃ syāt sa sarvasya prabhur yataḥ
viśvaste vañcakāś caiva nirvāsyāḥ sarva eva te
niyukto vāniyukto vā śāstrajño vaktum arhati
yat tena sadasi proktaṃ sa dharmo nātra saṃśayaḥ
gaṇakaḥ paścimā yas tu lekhako dakṣiṇāmukhaḥ
yathā yamaḥ priyadveṣyau prāpte kāle niyacchati
tathā rājñā niyantavyāḥ prajās tad dhi yamavratam
nyāyaśāstram atikramya sabhyair atra tu niścitam
tatra dharmo hato hanti sarvān eva na saṃśayaḥ
kevalaṃ śāstram āśritya na kartavyo vinirṇayaḥ
yuktiṃ vinā vicāreṇa māṇḍavyaś coratāṃ gataḥ
jayī tu yajamāno 'tra jitaḥ paśur udāhṛtaḥ
pūrvapakṣottarāv ādyaṃ pratijñā ca haviḥ smṛtaḥ
trayī śāstrāṇi sabhyās tu ṛtvijo dakṣiṇā damaḥ
āvedayati ced rājñe vyavahārapadaṃ hi tat
patitādikṛtaś caiva yaś ca na prakṛtiṃ gataḥ
evaṃ parīkṣitaṃ sabhyaiḥ pūrvpakṣaṃ tu lekhayet
janāparaktir bhavati balaṃ kośaś ca naśyati
matsyādāś ca narāḥ pūrve vyabhicāraratāḥ striyaḥ
uttare madyapā nāryaḥ spṛśyā nṝṇāṃ rajasvalāḥ
śāstravad yatnato rakṣyā saṃdigdhau sādhanaṃ tu sā
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā nirṇayaṃ kuryāt prāṅ niviṣṭavyavasthayā
arthinaś ca vacaḥ kāryaṃ vacaḥ pratyarthinas tathā
parīkṣya padam ādadyād anyathā narakaṃ vrajet
ekasya bahubhiḥ sardhaṃ strībhiḥ prekṣakarais tathā
viṣamasthāś ca nāsedhyāḥ strīsanāthās tathaiva ca
viṣamasthāś ca nāsedhyāḥ strīsanāthās tathaiva ca
matir notsahate yatra vivādaṃ kartum icchate
dātavyas tasya kālaḥ syād arthipratyarthinor api
tam evānāyayed rājā sudrayā puruṣeṇa vā
pūrvottaraṃ vaded bandhur niyukto 'nyo 'tha vā naraḥ
yajñe svāmyāpnuyāt puṇyaṃ hāniṃ vāde 'tha vā jayam
āhūto yas tu nāgacched darpād bandhubalānvitaḥ
kāle kāryārthinaṃ pṛcchet praṇataṃ purataḥ sthitam
kiṃ kāryaṃ kā ca te pīḍā mā bhaiṣīr brūhi mānava
evaṃ pṛṣṭaḥ sa yad brūyāt tat sabhyaiḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ saha
vimṛśya kāryaṃ nyāyyaṃ ced āhvānārtham ataḥ param
mudrāṃ dadyād yathā patraṃ puruṣaṃ vā samādiśet
āhūtas tv avamanyeta yaḥ śakto rājaśāsanam
na ca bhrātā na ca pitā na putro na niyogakṛt
na hīnapakṣāṃ yuvatiṃ kule jātāṃ prasūtikām
kālaṃ deśañ ca [?] vijñāya kāryāṇāṃ ca balāvalam
akalpādīn api śanair yānair āhvāpayen nṛpaḥ
niṣkulā yāś ca patitās tāsām āhvānam iṣyate
tān apy āhvāpayet rājā gurukāryeṣv akopayan
vaktavye 'rthe na tiṣṭhantam utkrāmantaṃ ca tadvacaḥ
caturvidhaḥ syād āsedhaḥ āsiddhas taṃ na laṅghayet
āseddhā tu svam āsedhaṃ svayam evotsṛjed yadi
na tasyātikramād doṣo na ca daṇḍaṃ prakalpayet
rājñe nivedanād ūrdhvaṃ āseddhā notsṛjed svayam
utsṛjec ced damo dāpya āsiddhaś ca na laṅghayet
śilpinaś cāpi tatkāle āyudhīyāś ca vigrahe
viṣamasthāś ca te sarve nāsedhyāḥ kāryasādhakaiḥ
āsedhayed anāsedhaiḥ sa daṇḍyo na tv atikramī
āsedhayaṃs tu nāsedhyaṃ rājñā śāsya iti sthitiḥ
pīḍitaḥ svayam āyātaḥ śastreṇārthī yadā bhavet
prāḍvivākas tu taṃ pṛcchet puruṣo vā śanaiḥ śanaiḥ
vacanṃ tasya na grāhyaṃ likhitapreṣitād ṛte
vādo varṇānupūrvyeṇa grāhyaḥ pīḍām avekṣya vā
pakṣaḥ proktas tv anādeyo vādī cānuttaras tathā
yādṛgvādī yaś ca pakṣo grāhyas tat kathayāmy aham
prāṅnyāye ca sa vijñeyo dvipāt saṃpratipattiṣu
upāyaiś codyamānas tu na dadyād uttaraṃ tu yaḥ
upasthite tatas tasmin vādī pakṣaṃ prakalpayet
yaṃ ca artham abhiyuñjīta na taṃ viprakṛtiṃ nayet
na ca pakṣāntaraṃ gacchet gacchan pūrvāt sa hīyate
asādhyaṃ vā viruddhaṃ vā pakṣaṃ rājā vivarjayet
na kenacit kṛto yas tu so 'prasiddha udāhṛtaḥ
asaṃbhāvyam asādhyaṃ taṃ pakṣam āhur manīṣiṇaḥ
yasminn āvedite pakṣe prāḍvivāke ca rājani
pure rāṣṭre virodhaḥ syād viruddhaḥ so 'bhidhīyate
viścitaṃ lokasiddhaṃ ca pakṣaṃ pakṣavido viduḥ
mohād vā yadi vā śāṭhyād yan noktaṃ pūrvavādinā
uttarāntargataṃ vāpi tad grāhyam ubhayor api
kriyām uktvānyathā [?] brūyāt sa vādī hānim āpnuyāt
na dadyād uttaraṃ yāvat pratyarthī sabhyasaṃnidhau
praṇivādī na dāpyaḥ syāt kartā tu vivadet svayam
santy anyāni padāny atra tāni rājā viśet svayam
svayaṃ notpādayet kāryaṃ rājā vā sāsya pūruṣaḥ
adhikāc chātayed arthān nyūnāṃś ca paripūrayet
bhūmau niveśayet tāvad yāvad artho viniścitaḥ
śrutaṃ ca likhitaṃ caiva śodhitaṃ ca vicāritam
āvedya tu gṛhīte 'rthe praśamaṃ yānti ye mithaḥ
anadeyās tu te sarve vyavahārāḥ prakīrttitāḥ
pāṇḍulekhena phalake bhūmyāṃ vā prathamaṇ likhet
nyūnādhikaṃ tu saṃśodhya paścāt patre niveśayet
yadi notsahate yatra vivādaṃ kartum icchatoḥ
dātavyas tatra kālaḥ syād arthipratyarthinor api
caturdhā nirṇayaḥ proktaḥ kaś cid aṣṭavidhaḥ smṛtaḥ
deśaḥ kālas tathā sthānaṃ saṃniveśas tathaiva ca
jñātṛsaṃjñā nivāsaś ca pramāṇaṃ kṣetranāma ca
śvolekhanaṃ vā labhate tryahaṃ saptāham eva vā
matir utpadyate yāvat vivāde vaktum icchataḥ
kāmaṃ tad api gṛhṇīyād rājā tattvabṛbhutsayā
vṛtte vāde punar nyāyaḥ pakṣo jñeyaś caturvidhaḥ
labdhe 'rthe 'bhyarthanaṃ mohas tathā vṛtte punaḥ kriyāḥ
rājñāpavarjito yas tu yaś ca pauravirodhakṛt
rāṣṭrasya vā samas tasya prakṛtīnāṃ tathaiva ca
nyāyaṃ va necchate kartum anyāyaṃ vā karoti yaḥ
na lekhayati yas tv evaṃ tasya pakṣī na sidhyati
viruddhaṃ cāviruddhaṃ ca dvāv apy arthau niveśitau
ekasmin yatra dṛśyete taṃ pakṣaṃ dūratas tyajet
yadā tv evaṃvidhaḥ pakṣaḥ kalpitaḥ pūrvavādinā
kālaṃ prārthayate yatra tatremaṃ labdhum arhati
māsaṃ catus trayaṃ varṣaṃ labhate śaktyapekṣayā
pūrvapakṣe yathārthaṃ tu na dadyād uttaraṃ tu yaḥ
priyapūrvaṃ vacaḥ sāma bhedas tu bhayadarśanam
āhutaḥ prapalāyī ca hīnaḥ pañcavidhaḥ smṛtaḥ
kanyāyā dūṣaṇe steye kalahe sāhaseṣu ca
upadhau kūṭasākṣye ca sadya eva vivādayet
prāṅnyāye kāraṇoktau ca pratyarthī nirdiśet kriyām
mithyoktau pūrvavādī tu pratipattau na saṃbhavet
anuktvā kāraṇaṃ yatra pakṣaṃ vādī prapadyate
pratipattis tu sā jñeyā kāraṇaṃ tūttaraṃ pṛthak
sarvālāpaṃ tu yaḥ kṛtvā mitho 'lpam api saṃvadet
sarvam eva tu dāpyaḥ syād abhiyukto bṛhaspatiḥ
vākpāruṣye ca bhūmyau ca divyaṃ tu parivarjayet
mithyā tat tu vijānīyād uttaraṃ vyavahārataḥ
sā tu saṃpratipattis tu śāstravidbhir udāhṛtā
arthinābhihito yo 'rthaḥ pratyarthī yadi taṃ tathā
prapadya kāraṇaṃ brūyāt pratyavaskandanaṃ hi tat
yo 'rthinārthaḥ prabhāṣyeta pratyarthī yadi taṃ tathā
prapadya kāraṇaṃ brūyād ādharyaṃ manur abravīt
sa vineyo jitaḥ pūrvaṃ prāṅnyāyas tu sa ucyate
tathye tathyaṃ prayuñjīta mithyāyāṃ cāpi lekhayet
kāraṇaṃ kāraṇopete prāgjaye tu jayaṃ tathā
satyā saṃpratipattis tu dharmyā sā parikīrtitā
viparītam adharmyaṃ syāt pratyarthī hānim āpnuyāt
vādo varṇānupūrvyeṇa grāhyaḥ pīḍām avekṣya ca
caturvidhasyāpy adhunā yat tad grāhyaṃ tad ucyate
bhayaṃ karoti bhedaṃ vā bhīṣaṇaṃ vā nirodhanam
yajñe svāmy āpnuyāt puṇyaṃ hāniṃ vāde 'tha vā jayaṃ
pratyarthī vā sutas tābhyāṃ vyavahāraṃ viśodhayet
anirṇīte vivāde tu vipralabdho bhaven nṛpaḥ
jayadānaṃ samaṃ na syāt tasmāt kāryāṇi nirṇayet
sākṣiṇas tu samuddiśya yas tu tān na vivādayet
triṃsadrātrāt tripakṣād vā tasya hāniḥ prajāyate
prapalāyī tripakṣeṇa maunī vā saptabhir dinaiḥ
yo 'bhiśastas tat kṣamate saṃyuktaṃ tam vidur janāḥ
yad yad gurutaraṃ kāryaṃ tat tat pūrvaṃ viśodhayet
pūrvam aṅgīkṛtaṃ tena jito 'sau daṇḍam arhati
nopasthito yadā kaś cic chalaṃ tatra na kārayet
daivarājakṛto doṣas tatkāle tu yadā bhavet
praśamaṃ ye mitho yānti dāpyas te dviguṇaṃ damam
dvayoḥ saṃtaptayoḥ sandhiḥ syād ayaḥkhaṇḍayor iva
tatra rājāmayā sandhir ubhayor api śasyate
yatra sāṃśāyiko dharmo vyavahāraś ca pārthive
sandhis tatra tu kartavyo 'yasoḥ saṃtaptayor yathā
samaḥ sandhis tadā kāryo viṣamas tu nivartate
na kliśyante sākṣisabhyā airaṃ ca vinivartate
vigrahāj jāyate nṛṇāṃ punardoṣas tathaiva ca
adveṣalobhā yad brūyus tat kartavyaṃ vijānatā
śodhite likhite samyag iti nirdoṣa uttare
ye tu tiṣṭhanti karaṇe teṣām sabhyair vibhāvanā
pratijñāṃ bhāvayed vādī pratyarthī kāraṇaṃ tathā
śrutvā pūrvottaraṃ sabhyair nirdiṣṭā yasya bhāvanā
dviprakārā kriyā proktā mānuṣīi daivikī tathā
sākṣiṇo likhitaṃ bhuktir mānuṣaṃ trividhaṃ smṛtam
dhaṭād yā dharmajāntā tu daivī navavidhā kriyā
sākṣī dvādaśa bhedas tu likhitaṃ tv aṣṭadhā smṛtam
anumānaṃ tridhā proktaṃ navadhā daivikī kriyā
prathame vā tṛtīye vā pramāṇaṃ daivamānuṣam
kriyā na daivikī proktā vidyamāneṣu sākṣiṣu
lekhye ca sati vādeṣu na syād divyaṃ na sākṣiṇaḥ
nṛpadrohe sāhase ca kalpayed daivikīṃ kriyām
divyaiḥ kāryaṃ parīkṣeta rājā satsv api sākṣiṣu
likhite sākṣivāde ca saṃdigdhir jāyate yadi
anumāne ca saṃbhrānte tatra divyaṃ viśodhanam
sākṣiṇaḥ sādhanaṃ proktaṃ na divyaṃ na ca lekhakam
balodbhūteṣu kāryeṣu sākṣiṇo divyam eva ca
ṛṇe lekhyaṃ sākṣiṇo vā yuktileśādayo 'pi vā
daivikī vā kriyā proktā prajānāṃ hitakāmyayā
nava sapta ca pañca syuś catvāras traya eva vā
ubhau vā śrotriyau khyātau naikaṃ pṛcchet kadā cana
eka eva pramāṇaṃ syān nṛpo 'dhyakṣas tathaiva ca
stenāḥ sāhasikāḥ ṣaṇḍāḥ kitavāḥ sūcakās tathā
na sākṣiṇas te duṣṭātvāt teṣu sākṣiyaṃ na vidyate
nṛpo 'dhyakṣas tathā grāmaḥ sākṣī dvādaśadhā smṛtaḥ
jātināmādilikhitaṃ yena svaṃ pitryam eva ca
arthinā ca kriyā bhedais tasya kṛtvā ṛṇādikam
pratyakṣaṃ likhyate yas tu lekhitaḥ sa udāhṛtaḥ
vinihnuto yathābhūtaṃ gūḍhaḥ sākṣī sa ucyate
smāryate ca muhuryaś ca smāritaḥ sa udāhṛtaḥ
dvayoḥ samāno dharmajñaḥ kulyaḥ sa parikīrtitaḥ
ubhayoḥ saṃmataḥ sādhuḥ dūtakaḥ sa udāhṛtaḥ
kriyamāṇe tu kartavye yaḥ kaś cit svayam āgataḥ
atra sākṣī tvam asmākam ukto yādṛcchikas tu saḥ
yatra sākṣī diśaṃ gacchen mumūrṣur vā yathākramam
anyaṃ saṃśrāvayet taṃ tu vidyād uttarasākṣiṇam
sākṣiṇām api yaḥ sākṣyam upary upari bhāṣatām
śravaṇāc chravaṇād vāpi sa sākṣy uttarasaṃjñitaḥ
ubhābhyāṃ yasya viśvastaṃ kāryaṃ cāpi niveditam
arthipratyarthinor vākyaṃ yac chrutaṃ bhūbhṛtā svayam
sa eva tatra sākṣī syād visaṃvāde dvayor api
nirṇīte vyavahāre tu punar nyāyo yadā bhavet
adhyakṣaḥ sabhyasahitaḥ sākṣī syāt tatra nānyathā
vyuṣitaṃ chāditaṃ yatra sīmāyāṃ ca samantataḥ
sa kṛtto 'pi bhavet sākṣī grāmas tatra na saṃśayaḥ
likhitau dvau tathā gūḍhau tricatuḥpañca lekhitāḥ
eka eva pramāṇaṃ syān nṛpo 'dhyakṣas tathaiva ca
aduṣṭaṃ dūṣayan vādī tatsamaṃ daṇḍam arhati
lekhyadoṣās tu ye kecit sākṣiṇām caiva ye smṛtāḥ
vādakāle tu vaktavyāḥ paścād uktān na dūṣayet
patre vilikhya tān sarvān vācyaṃ pratyuttaraṃ tataḥ
pratipattau na sākṣitvam arhanti tu kadā cana
abhāvayan damaṃ dāpyaḥ pratyarthī sākṣiṇā sphuṭam
jitaḥ sa vinayaṃ dāpyaḥ śāstradṛṣṭena karmaṇā
yadi vādī nirākāṅkṣaḥ sākṣī satye vyavasthitaḥ
ukte 'rthe sākṣiṇo yas tu dūṣayan prāgadūṣitān
na ca tatkāraṇaṃ brūyāt prāpnuyāt pūrvasāhasam
lekhyaṃ vā sākṣiṇo vāpi vivāde yasya dūṣitāḥ
tasya kāryaṃ na śodhyaṃ tu yāvat tan na viśodhayet
sākṣibhir gaditaiḥ sabhyaiḥ prakrānte nirṇaye tu yaḥ
śuddheṣu sākṣiṣu tataḥ paścāt kāryaṃ viśodhayet
ā janmanaś cā maraṇāt sukṛtaṃ yat tvayārjitam
kūṭasab hyaḥ kūṭasākṣī brahmahā ca samāḥ smṛtāḥ
evaṃ viditvā yaḥ sākṣī sa yathārthaṃ vadet tataḥ
teneha kīrtim āpnoti paratra ca śubhāṃ gatim
puruṣāḥ santi lobhād ye kāryaṃ prabrūyur anyathā
praṣṭavyāḥ sākṣiṇo ye tu varjyāś caiva narādhamāḥ
mātuḥ pitā pitṛvyaś ca bhāryāyā bhrātṛmātarau
bhrātā sakhā ca jāmātā sarvavādeṣv asākṣiṇaḥ
unmattārtāḥ sāhasikā nāstikāś ca na sākṣiṇaḥ
santo 'pi na pramāṇaṃ syur mṛte dhanini sākṣiṇaḥ
putre tu śrāvitā ye syuḥ svayam āsannamṛtyunā
hiraṇyaṃ gośakṛd darbhān samādāya ṛtaṃ vadet
sa jayī syād anyathā tu sādhyārthaṃ na samāpnuyāt
ṛṇaṃ damaṃ ca dāpyaḥ syāt tripakṣāt paratas tu saḥ
sākṣidvaidhe prabhūtāḥ syur grāhyāḥ sāmye guṇānvitāḥ
sākṣiṇaḥ san niroddhvyā garhyā daṇḍyāś ca dharmataḥ
anyūnaṃ cen nigaditaṃ siddhaṃ sādhyaṃ vinirdiśet
yatra vipratipattiḥ syāt sākṣyaṃ tad api nānyathā
nirdiṣṭeṣv arthajāteṣu sākṣī cet sākṣya āgate
na brūyād akṣasrasamaṃ na tan nigaditaṃ bhavet
ūnādhikaṃ tu yatroktaṃ na tan nigaditaṃ bhavet
ūnam abhyadhikaṃ vārtham vibrūyur yatra sākṣiṇaḥ
strīsaṅge sāhase caurye yat sādhyaṃ parikalpyate
ūnādhikaṃ tu yatra syāt sākṣyaṃ tatra vivarjayet
sākṣī tatra na daṇḍyaḥ syād abruvan daṇḍam arhati
lekhyaṃ tat trividhaṃ proktaṃ bhinnaṃ tad bahudhā punaḥ
vibhāgapatram ity etad bhāgānāṃ nirṇaye kṛtam
bhrātaraḥ saṃvibhaktā ye svarucyā tu parasparam
bhūmiṃ dattvā yas tu patraṃ kuryāc candrārkakālikam
anācchedām anāhāryaṃ dānalekhyaṃ tu tad vidhuḥ
patraṃ kārayate yat tu krayalekhyaṃ tad ucyate
jaṅgamaṃ sthāvaram bandhaṃ dattvā lekhyaṃ karoti yat
grāmo deśaś ca yat kuryān mattalekhyaṃ parasparam
vastrānnahīnaḥ kāntāre likhitaṃ kurute tu yat
karmāhaṃ te kariṣyāmi dāsapatraṃ tad iṣyate
dhanaṃ vṛdhyā gṛhītvā tu svayaṃ kuryāc ca kārayet
tasyāstu sādhanaṃ lekhyaṃ na divyaṃ na ca sākṣiṇaḥ
dattvā bhyymyādikaṃ rājā tāmrapatre paṭe 'tha vā
dātuḥ pālayituḥ svargaṃ hartur narakam eva ca

prasādalikhitam
	    deśādikaṃ yasya rājā likhitaṃ tu prayacchati
pradadyāj jayine lekhyaṃ jayapatraṃ tad ucyate
sādhayet sādhyam arthaṃ tu catuṣpādanvitaṃ jaye
kūṭalekhyaṃ tu tat prāha lekhako vāpi tādṛśaḥ
darpaṇasthaṃ yathā bimbam asat sad iva dṛśyate
tathā lekhyasabimb āni kurvanti kuśalā janāḥ
tathyena hi pramāṇaṃ tu doṣeṇaiva tu dūṣaṇam
evaṃ duṣṭaṃ nṛpasthāne yasmiṃs tad dhi vicāryate
tena duṣṭaṃ bhavel lekhyaṃ śuddhaiḥ śuddhaṃ vinirdiśet
dattaṃ lekhye svahastaṃ tu ṛṇiko yadi nihnute
patrasthaiḥ sākṣibhir vācā lekhakasya matena ca
yatraivaṃ syuḥ sthitā varṇā lekhyaṃ duṣṭaṃ tadā bhṛguḥ
uddharel lekhyam āhartā tatputro bhuktim eva tu
abhiyuktaḥ pramītaś cet tatputras tat samuddharet
lekhyam ālekhyavat kecil likhanti kuśalā janāḥ
tasmān na lekhyasāmarthyāt siddhir aikāntikī matā
lekhyaṃ kṛtvā svanāmāṅkaṃ jñeyaṃ yuktyāgamais tu tat
darśitaṃ pratikālaṃ yac chrāvitaṃ smāritaṃ ca yat
lekhyaṃ sidhyati sarvatra mṛteṣv api hi sākṣiṣu
kriyāṇāṃ sarvanāśaḥ syād anavasthā ca jāyate
lekhyaṃ triṃśat samātītam adṛṣṭāśrāvitaṃ ca yat
na tatsiddhim avāpnoti tiṣṭhatsv api hi sākṣiṣu
prayukte śāntalābhe tu likhitaṃ yo na darśayet
na yācate ca ṛṇikaṃ tat saṃdeham avāpnuyāt
śrāvayet smārayec caiva tathā syād balavattaram
yadi labdhaṃ bhavet kiñ cit prajñaptir vā tathā bhavet
pramāṇam eva likhitaṃ mṛtā yady api sākṣiṇaḥ
āḍhyasya nikaṭasthasya yac chaktena na yācitam
atha pañcatvam āpanno lekhakaḥ sākṣibhiḥ saha
tat svahastādibhis teṣām viśudhyate na saṃśayaḥ
na jātu hīyate lekhyaṃ sākṣibhiḥ śapathena vā
ataḥ parīkṣyam ubhayam etad rājñā viśeṣataḥ
ekam eva bhavel lekhyam ekasyārthasya siddhaye
anekeṣu tu lekhyeṣu doṣam utpādayed api
kṛtam asvāminā yac ca sādhyahīnaṃ ca duṣyati
dhanamūlāḥ kriyāḥ sarvā yatnās tatsādhane matāḥ
vardhanaṃ rakṣaṇaṃ bhoga iti tasya vidhikramaḥ
tat punas trividhaṃ jñeyaṃ śuklaṃ śabaḷam eva ca
kṛṣṇaṃ ca tatra vijñeyaḥ prabhedaḥ saptadhā punaḥ
dhanaṃ saptavidhaṃ śulkam ubhayo hy asya tadvidhaḥ
vyājenopārjitaṃ yac ca tat kṛṣṇaṃ samudāhṛtam
tena krayo vikrayaś ca dānaṃ grahaṇam eva ca
vividhāś ca prayujyante kriyāsaṃbhogam eva ca
yathāvidhena dravyeṇa yat kiñ cit kurute naraḥ
tathāvidham avāpnoti tatphalaṃ pretya ceha ca
sādhāraṇaṃ syāt trividhaṃ śeṣaṃ navavidhaṃ smṛtam
kramāgataṃ prītidāyaṃ prāptaṃ ca saha bhāryayā
pratigrahaṇalabdhaṃ yad yājyaṃ tac chiṣyatas tathā
sarveṣām eva varṇānām evaṃ dharmyo dhanāgamaḥ
viparyayād adharmaḥ syān na ced āpad garīyasī
vaiśyavṛttiś ca tasyoktā na jaghanyā kathaṃ cana
kathaṃ cana na kurvīta brāhmaṇaḥ karma vārṣalam
vṛṣalaḥ karma na brāhmaṃ patanīye hi te tayoḥ
utkṛṣṭaṃ cāpakṛṣṭaṃ tayoḥ karma na vidyate
madhyame karmaṇī hitvā sarvasādhāraṇī hi te
āpadaṃ brāhmaṇas tīrtvā kṣatravṛttyā bhṛte jane
utsṛjet kṣetravṛttiṃ tāṃ kṛtvā pāvanam ātmanaḥ
tasyām eva tu yo bhuktau brāhmaṇo ramate rasāt
svakulaṃ pṛṣṭhataḥ kṛtvā yo vai parakulaṃ vrajet
saṃbhave sākṣiṇāṃ caiva na divyā bhavati kriyā
bhuktir eva tu gurvo syān na lekhyaṃ na ca sākṣiṇaḥ
etad vidhānam ākhyātaṃ sākṣiṇāṃ likhitasya ca
saṃprati sthāvaraprāpter bhukteś ca vidhir ucyate
prāpte saptavidhe bhogaḥ sāgamaḥ siddhim āpnuyāt
evaṃvidhas tu yo bhogaḥ sa tu siddhim avāpnuyāt
sthāvaraṃ siddhim āpnoti bhuktvā hānim upekṣayā
tasya tatsiddhim āpnoti hāniṃ copekṣayā yathā
triṃśadvarṣāṇy avicchinnā tasya tāṃ na vicālayet
na strīṇām upabhogaḥ syād vinā lekhyaṃ kathaṃ cana
bhuktyā kevalayā naiva bhuktiḥ siddhim avāpnuyāt
bālaśrotriyavitte ca prāpte ca pitṛtaḥ kramāt
nopabhoge balaṃ kāryam āhartrā tatsutena vā
āgamo 'pi balaṃ naiva bhuktiḥ stokāpi yatra no
anumānād varaḥ sākṣī sākṣibhyo likhitaṃ guru
anumānaṃ vasaty atra sākṣī cāmaraṇād bhavet
triṃśat samā tu yā bhuktā bhūmir avyāhatā paraiḥ
bhuktiḥ sā pauruṣī jñeyā dviguṇā ca dvipuruṣī
tripūruṣī ca triguṇā parataḥ syāc cirantanā
yatrāhartābhiyuktaḥ syāl lekhyaṃ sākṣī tadā guruḥ
tadabhāve tu putrāṇāṃ bhuktir ekā garīyasī
āhartā śodhayed bhuktim āgamaṃ vāpi saṃsadi
tatputro bhuktim evaikāṃ pautrādis tu na kiṃcana
rikthabhir vā parair dravyaṃ samakṣaṃ yasya dīyate
anyasya bhuñjataḥ paścān na sa tal labdhum arhati
paśyann anyasya dadataḥ kṣitiṃ yo na nivārayet
satāpi lekhyena bhuvaṃ na punar tām avāpnuyāt
ṛkthibhir vāparair vāpi dattaṃ tenaiva tad bhṛguḥ
bhuktis tripuruṣī sidhyet pareṣāṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ
snehaḥ suhṛdbāndhaveṣu bhuktam etair na hīyate
vaivāhya śrotriyair bhuktaṃ rājñāmātyais tathaiva ca
sudīrghenāpi kālena teṣāṃ sidhyati tan na tu
śāsanārūḍham anyena bhuktaṃ bhuktyā na hīyate
chinnabhoge gṛhe kṣetre saṃdigdhaṃ yatra jāyate
lekhyena bhogavidbhir vā sākṣibhiḥ śuddhim āharet
nāmaghāṭāgamaṃ saṃkhyāṃ kālaṃ digbhāgam eva ca
bhogacchedanimittaṃ ca ye vidus tatra sākṣiṇaḥ
utpannāś cātyāsannā ye ye ca deśāntarasthitāḥ
maulās te tu samuddiṣṭāḥ praṣṭavyāḥ kāryanirṇaye
aduṣṭās te tu yad brūyuḥ saṃdigdhe samadṛṣṭayaḥ
tatpramāṇaṃ prakartavyam evaṃ dharmo na hīyate
rājāntarais tribhir bhuktaṃ pramāṇena vināpi yat
brahmadeyaṃ na hartavyaṃ rājñā tasya kadā cana
tadbhogaḥ sthiratāṃ yāti na pṛcched āgamāṃ kva cit
aniṣiddhena yad bhuktaṃ puruṣais tribhir eva tu
tatra naivāgamaḥ kāryo bhuktis tatra garīyasī
sthāvareṣu vivādeṣu bhuktis tripuruṣī ca yā
svatantraiva hi sā jñeyā pramāṇam sādhyanirṇaye
evaṃvidhā brahmadeyā hartuṃ tasya na śakyate
na sā cālayituṃ śakyā pūrvakāc chāsanād ṛte
tasya sā nāpahartavyā kṣamāliṅgaṃ na ced vadet
bhuktir balavatī śāstre hy avicchinnā cirantanī
vicchinnāpi hi sa jñeyā yā tu pūrvaṃ prasādhitā
pitrā bhuktaṃ tu yad dravyaṃ bhuktyācāreṇa dharmataḥ
tasmin prete 'pi tatprāptaṃ bhuktyā prāptaṃ tu tasya tat
tribhir eva tu yā bhuktā puruṣair bhūr yathāvidhi
lekhyābhāve tu tāṃ tatra caturthaḥ samavāpnuyāt
sanābhibhir bāndhavaiś ca bhuktaṃ yat svajanais tathā
bhogāt tatra na siddhiḥ syād bhogam anyeṣu kalpayet
tena kāryāṇi sidhyanti sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca
alābhe svakośād vā adadac corakilbiṣī syāt //
pramāṇahīne vāde tu nirdoṣā daivikī kriyā
dhaṭādyā dharmajāntā ca daivī navavidhā smṛtā
dhaṭo 'gnir udakaṃ caiva viṣaṃ kośaś ca pañcamam
ṣaṣṭhaṃ ca taṇḍulāḥ proktaṃ saptamaṃ taptamāṣakaḥ
aṣṭamaṃ kālam ity uktaṃ navamaṃ dharmakaṃ tathā
niṣkaṃ suvarṇāś catvāraḥ kārṣikas tāmrikaḥ paṇaḥ
sa eva cāndrikā proktā tāś catasras tu dhānakāḥ
tā dvādaśa suvarṇas tu dīnārākhyaḥ sa eva tu
tadardhaṃ madhyamaḥ proktas tadardham adhamaḥ smṛtaḥ
vaiśyasya salilaṃ deyaṃ śūdrasya viṣam eva tu
snehāt krodhāl lobhato vā bhedam āyānti sākṣiṇaḥ
vidhidattasya divyasya na bhedo jāyate kvacit
ayathoktaṃ pradattaṃ cen na dattaṃ sādhyasādhane
rucyā cānyataraḥ kuryād itaro vartayec chiraḥ
vināpi śīrṣakaṃ kuryān nṛpadrohe ca pātake
na kaś cid abhiyoktāraṃ divyeṣv evaṃ niyojayet
pratyūṣaś ca prabhāsaś ca vasavo 'ṣṭau prakīrtitāḥ
dhātāryamā ca mitraś ca varuṇo 'ṃśo bhagas tathā
indro vivasvān pūṣā ca parjanyo daśamaḥ smṛtaḥ
tatas tvaṣṭā tato viṣṇur ajaghanyo jaghanyajaḥ
agneḥ paścimabhāge tu rudrāṇām ayanaṃ viduḥ
vīrabhadraś ca śambhuś ca girīśaś ca mahāyaśāḥ
sthāṇur bhagaś ca bhagavān rudrāś caikādaśa smṛtāḥ
brāhmī māheśvarī caiva kaumārī vaiṣṇavī tathā
śvasanaḥ sparśano vāyur anilo mārutas tathā
kārṣāpaṇāntā sā divye niyojyā vinayet tathā
tripādone ca salilam ardhe deyo dhaṭaḥ sadā
triśate taṇḍulā deyāḥ kośaś caiva tadardhake
yavārdhikasya vā nāśe tadardhasya ca taṇḍulāḥ
tato 'rdhārdhārdhanāśe ca laukikī ca kriyā matā
ete ca śapathāḥ proktāḥ alpārthe sukarāḥ sadā
brūhīti brāhmaṇaṃ brūyāt satyaṃ brūhīti pārthivam
gobījakāñcanair vaiśyaṃ śūdraṃ sarvaiś ca pātakaiḥ
preṣyān vārdhuṣikāṃś caiva viprāñ śūdravad ācaret
dvijatvam abhikāṅkṣante tāṃś ca śūdravad ācaret
sarvasākṣyeṣv ayaṃ dharmo hy anyatra sthāvareṣu ca
vadhe cet prāṇinām sāksyaṃ vādayec chavasaṃnidhau
nāpṛṣṭair aniyuktair vā samaṃ satyaṃ prayatnataḥ
svabhāvoktaṃ vacas teṣāṃ grāhyaṃ yad doṣavarjitam
ukte tu sākṣiṇo rājñā na pṛṣṭavyāḥ punaḥ punaḥ
saṃbhave sākṣiṇāṃ prājño daivikīṃ tu vivarjayet
evam saṃkhyā nikṛṣṭānām madhyānāṃ dviguṇā smṛtā
dhaṭe 'bhiyuktas tulito hīnaś ced dhāni āpnuyāt
tatsamas tu punas tulyo vardhito vijayī bhavet
śikyacchede 'kṣabhaṅge vā dayāc chikyaṃ punar nṛpaḥ
jñātinaḥ śucayo lubdhāḥ niyoktavyā nṛpeṇa tu
kārayen maṇḍalāny aṣṭau purastān navame tathā
āgneyaṃ maṇḍalaṃ tv ādyaṃ dvitīyaṃ vāruṇaṃ smṛtam
pañcamaṃ tv indradaivatyaṃ ṣaṣṭhaṃ kauberam ucyate
purastān navamaṃ yat tu tan mahat pārthivam viduḥ
gomayena kṛtāni syur adbhiḥ paryuṣitāni ca
kartuḥ samapadaṃ kāryaṃ maṇḍalaṃ tu pramāṇataḥ
gacchet paramayā śaktyā yatrāsau madhyamaḥ śaraḥ
pratyāgacchet tu vegena yataḥ sa puruṣo gataḥ
āgantas tu śaragrāhī na paśyati yadā jale
ānīte madhyame bāṇe magnāṅgaḥ śucitām iyāt
anyathā na viśuddhaḥ syād ekāṅgasyāpi darśanāt
sthānād vānyatra gamanād yasmin pūrvaṃ niveśayet
iṣūun na nikṣiped vidvān mārute vāti vai bhṛśam
vidhidattaṃ viṣaṃ yena jīrṇaṃ mantrauṣadhaṃ vinā
sa śuddhaḥ syād anyathā tu daṇḍyo dāpyaś ca taddhanam
saptāhād vā dvisaptāhād yasya hānir na jāyate
putradāradhanānāṃ ca sa śuddhaḥ syān na saṃśayaḥ
yad bhaktaḥ so 'bhiyuktaḥ syāt tad evāyudhamaṇḍalam
prakṣālya pāyayet tasmāj jalāt tu prasṛtitrayam
trirātraṃ pañcarātram vā puruṣaiḥ svair adhiṣthitam
divyāni varjayen nityam ārtānāṃ tu gadair nṛṇām
śuddhaḥ syāc chuklaniṣṭḥīve viparīte tu doṣabhāk
śoṇitaṃ dṛśyate yatra hanus tālu ca śīryataḥ
gātraṃ ca kampate yasya tam aśuddham vinirdiśet
sauvarṇe rājate tāmre āyase mṛṇmaye 'pi vā
gavyaṃ ghṛtam upādāya tad agnau tāpayec chuciḥ
sauvarṇīṃ rājtīṃ tāmrīm āyasīṃ vā suśobhanām
tataś cānena mantreṇa sakṛt tad abhimantrayet
paraṃ pavitram amṛtaṃ ghṛta tvaṃ yajñakarmasu
daha pāvaka pāpaṃ tvaṃ himaśī[to?]taḥ śucau bhava
grāhayen mudrikāṃ tāṃ tu ghṛtamadhyagatāṃ tathā
karāgraṃ yo nu dhunuyāt visphoṭo vā na jāyate
adagdhaś cec chuddhim iyād anyathā tv apahīyate
agnivarṇaṃ tu tac coro jihvayā lelihet sakṛt
na dagdhaś cec chuddhim iyād anyathā tu sa hīyate
āmantrya pūjayed gandhaiḥ kusumaiś ca sitāsitaiḥ
samau kṛtvā tu tau kumbhe sthāpyau cānupalakṣitau
dharme gṛhīte śuddhaḥ syāt sa pūjyaś ca parīkṣakaiḥ
adharme saṃgṛhīte tu daṇḍyo nirvāsya eva vā
gomayena mṛdā vāpi piṇḍau kāryau samau tataḥ
samarcayet tato devān lokapālāṃś ca pūrvavat
yadi pāpavimukto 'haṃ dharmaś cāyātu me kare
dharme gṛhīte śuddhiḥ syād adharme tu sa hīyate
evaṃ vicārayan rājā dharmārthābhyāṃ na hīyate
samyag vicārya kāryaṃ tu yuktyā saṃparikalptam
parīkṣitaṃ tu śapathaiḥ sa jñeyo dharmanirṇayaḥ
prativādī prapadyed yatra dharmaḥ sa nirṇayaḥ
pramāṇaniścito yas tu vyavahāraḥ sa ucyate
vadhādṛte brāhmaṇasya daṇḍo bhavati karhi cit
avadhyā brāhmaṇā gāvo loke 'smin vaidikī smṛtiḥ
pitācāryaḥ suhṛn mātā bhāryā putraḥ purohitaḥ
nādaṇḍyo nāma rājño 'sti dharmād vicalitaḥ svakāt
dharmād vicalitā daṇḍyā nirvāsyā rājabhiḥ purāt
vivādino narāṃś cānyān dhigdhanābhyāṃ ca daṇḍayet
pratilomās tathā cāntyāḥ puruṣāṇāṃ malāḥ smṛtāḥ
brāhmaṇātikrame vadhyā na dātavyā damaṃ kva cit
vadhārhakaḥ svarṇaśataṃ damaṃ dāpyas tu pūruṣaḥ
tāḍanaṃ bandhanaṃ caiva tathaiva ca viḍannakam
eṣa daṇḍo hi śūdrasya nārthadaṇḍo bṛhaspatiḥ
hīnasya gṛhyate vādo na svavākyajitasya ca
kulādibhir niścite 'pi na saṃtoṣaṃ gatas tu yaḥ
vicārya tatkṛtaṃ rājā kukṛtaṃ punar uddharet
daṇḍayej jayinā sākaṃ pūrvasabhyāṃs tu doṣiṇaḥ
yo na dadyād deyadamaṃ sa nirvāsyas tataḥ purāt
svadeśe vā videśe vā na svātantryaṃ visaṃvadet
jayaṃ dānaṃ damaṃ rājā sabhyāḥ puṇyam avāpnuyuḥ
yatraivaṃ vetti nṛpatiḥ nirṇayaṃ tu batādhvaram
so 'smin loke yaśaḥ prāpya yāti śakrasalokatām
ṛṇaṃ deyam adeyaṃ ca yena yatra yathā ca yat
aśītibhāgo vṛddhiḥ syān māsi māsi sabandhake
lekhyārūḍhaṃ sākṣimad vā ṛṇaṃ dadyād dhanī sadā
kāritā ca śikhāvṛddhir bhogalābhas tathaiva ca
kāyikā karmasaṃyuktā māsād grāhyā ca kālikā
vṛddher vṛddhiś cakravṛddhiḥ kāritā ṛṇinā kṛtā
pratyahaṃ gṛhyate yā tu śikhāvṛddhis tu sā smṛtā
ṛṇikena tu yā vṛddhir adhikā saṃprakalpitā
āpatkālakṛtā nityaṃ dātavyā sā tu kāritā
anyathā kāritā vṛddhir na dātavyā kathañ cana
mūle datte tathaivaiṣā śikhāvṛddhis tataḥ smṛtā
gṛhī stomaḥ śadaḥ kṣetrād bhogalābhaḥ prakīrtitaḥ
kāyikā bhogavṛddhiṃ ca kāritāṃ ca śikhātmikām
catuṣṭayīṃ vṛddhim āhuś cakravṛdhyā tu pañcamīm
śikhā vṛddhiṃ kāyikāṃ ca bhogalābhaṃ tathaiva ca
dhanī tāvat samādadyād yāvan mūlaṃ na śodhitam
vṛddhir aṣṭaguṇā proktā guḍasya lavaṇasya ca
bhāgo yad dviguṇād ūrdhvaṃ cakravṛddhiś ca gṛhyate
pūrṇe ca sodayaṃ paścād vārddhuṣyaṃ tad vigarhitam
prayuktaṃ saptabhir varṣais tribhāgoanair na saṃśayaḥ
hetipuṣpaphalānāṃ ca vṛddhis tu na nivartate
śikhāvṛddhiṃ kāyikāṃ ca bhoge lābhaṃ tathaiva ca
dhanī tāvat samādadyād yāvan mūlaṃ na śodhitam
samavṛddhiḥ sadā kuryād viṣamas tu nivartate
pañca māṣās tu viṃśatyā evaṃ dharmo na hīyate
tatra tv idam upekṣāṃ vā yaḥ kaścit kurute naraḥ
tato labheta yat kiṃcit sarveṣām eva tat samam
yatnaiḥ prāptaṃ rakṣitaṃ vā gaṇārthe vā ṛṇaṃ kṛtam
svadeśastho 'pi vā yas tu na dadyād yācito 'sakṛt
sa tatra kāritāṃ vṛddhim anicchann api cāharet[?]
na niḥsravati yat tat syād dhaniko mūlabhāg bhavet
dviguṇād api cotkarṣe kālikā yasya cādinām
ādhis tu bhujyate tāvad yāvat tan na pradīyate
ādhir bandhaḥ samākhyātaḥ sa ca proktaś caturvidhaḥ
jaṅgamaḥ sthāvaraś caiva gopyo bhogyas tathaiva ca
aśāntalābhe ca ṛṇe tathā pūrṇe 'vadhau dhanī
yo bhuṅkte bandhakaṃ lobhān na sa lābho bhavet punaḥ
tatrādhiṃ dāpayed dadyāt sodayaṃ dhanam anyathā
bandhahastasya yad deyaṃ citreṇa caritena vā
bahumūlyaṃ tatra naṣṭam ṛṇikaṃ tatra toṣayet
kṣetram ekaṃ dvayor bandhe dattaṃ yat samakālikam
yena bhuktaṃ bhavet pūrvaṃ tasya siddhim avāpnuyāt
pradāne vikraye caiva vidhiḥ sa parikīrtitaḥ
anirdiṣṭaṃ ca nirdiṣṭaṃ ekatra ca viśeṣitam
bandhakasya dhanī svāmī dvisaptāhaṃ pratīkṣya tu
tadantarā dhanaṃ dattvā ṛṇī bandham avāpnuyāt
pūrṇe vidhau sāntalābhe bandhasvāmī tato bhavet
anirgate daśāhe tu ṛṇī mokṣitum arhati
rakṣed vā kṛtamūlyaṃ tu daśāhaṃ janasaṃsadi
na bhuṅkte yaḥ svam ādhānaṃ nādadyān na nivedayet
pūrvaṃ kṛtā kriyā yā tu pālanīyā tathaiva sā
anyathā kriyate yatra kriyābhedas tadā bhavet
kuryān nyūnādhikaṃ tulyaṃ kriyābhedaḥ sa ucyate
dvikenārthaṃ samādāya prapannaḥ pañcakaṃ tu yaḥ
lābhaṃ tatra pramāṇaṃ syāt paścimaṃ yad dhi niścitaṃ
asvāminā kṛto yas tu dāyo vikraya eva vā
akṛtaḥ sa tu vijñeyo vyavahāre yathāsthitiḥ
yaḥ paścimaḥ kriyākāraḥ sa pūrvād balavattaraḥ
nyāsaṃ kṛtvā paratrādhiṃ kṛtvā vādhiṃ karoti yaḥ
vikrayaṃ vā kriyā tatra paścimā balavattarā
trayāṇām api saṃdigdhe kathaṃ tatra vicāraṇā
sāmakaṃ karṣitaṃ tat syāt tadā na dhanabhāgdhanī
ṛṇī ca na labhed bandhaṃ parasparamataṃ vinā
dhanaṃ mūlīkṛtaṃ dattvā yad ādhiṃ prārthayed ṛṇī
tadaiva tasya moktavyas tv anyathā doṣabhāgdhanī
kṣetrādikaṃ yadā bhuktam utpannam adhikaṃ tataḥ
mūlodayaṃ praviṣṭaṃ cet tad ādhiṃ prāpnuyād ṛṇī
paribhāṣya yadā kṣetraṃ dadyāt tu dhanine ṛṇī
tadā tac chāntalābhe 'rthe moktavyam iti niścayaḥ
ādhis tu sodaye dravye pradātavyaṃ tvayā mama
tatra rṇī cāpnuyād bandhaṃ dhanī caiva ṛṇaṃ tathā
yadi prakarṣitaṃ tat syāt tadā na dhanabhāgdhanī
ṛṇī na labhate bandhaṃ parasparamataṃ vinā
dātāham etad draviṇam arpatāmy aparo vadet
darśanapratibhūryas tu deśe kāle ca darśayet
deśādhvarūpataḥ pakṣaṃ māsaṃ sārdham athāpi vā
yo yasya pratibhūs tiṣṭhed darśanāyeha mānavaḥ
adarśayaṃ sa taṃ tasmai prayacchet svadhanād ṛṇam
ādyau tu vitathe dāpyau tatkālāveditaṃ dhanam
uttarau tu visaṃvāde tau vinā tatsutau tathā
putreṇāpi samaṃ deyam ṛṇaṃ sarvaṃ tu paitṛkam
pratibhāvyaṃ tu yo dadyāt pīḍitaḥ pratibhāvitaḥ
tripakṣāt parataḥ so 'rthaṃ dviguṇaṃ labdhum arhati
sādhutvāc cen mandadhiya ṛṇaṃ dadyur abhāvitāḥ
yad arthaṃ dāpitās tasmān na labheran kathañ cana
nātyantaṃ pīḍanīyāḥ syur ṛṇaṃ dāpyāḥ śanaiḥ śanaiḥ
svasākṣyeṇa[e na] niyojyāḥ syur vidhiḥ pratibhuvām ayam
naṣṭe mṛte vā ṛṇike dhanī patraṃ pradarśayet
pratibhuvā tu yad dattam apṛṣṭam ṛṇike dhanam
dviguṇaṃ na pratibhuve pradeyam ṛṇikena tu
prāyeṇa dhanine dāpyo dharma eṣa udāhṛtaḥ
brāhmaṇas tu parikṣīṇaḥ śanair dāpyo yathodayam
chadmanā yācitaṃ cārtham ānīya ṛṇikād dhanī
ṛṇiko dāpyate yatra balāt kāraḥ sa kīrtitaḥ
samo 'pakṛṣṭajātiś ca dadyāc cheyāṃs tu tacchanaiḥ
brāhmaṇas tu parikṣīṇaḥ śanair dāpyo yathodayam
yatrarṇī dāpyate 'rthaṃ svaṃ tad ācaritam ucyate
pradātavyaṃ yad bhavati nyāyatas tad dadāmy aham
evaṃ yatrarṇiko brūte kriyāvādī sa ucyate
na roddhavyaḥ kriyāvādī saṃdigdhe 'rthe kathañ cana
āsedhayaṃs tv anāsedhyaṃ daṇḍyo bhavati dharmataḥ
bhogalābhas tadā tatra mūlaṃ syāt sodayaṃ nṛṇām
anāvedya tu rājñe yaḥ saṃdigdhe 'rthe pravartate
prasahya sa vineyaḥ syāt sa cāpy artho na sidhyati
yena yatra yathā deyam adeyaṃ cocyate 'dhunā
pūrṇe 'vadhau śāntalābham abhāve ca pituḥ sutaiḥ
tapasvī cāgnihotrī ca ṛṇavān mriyate yadi
tapasyā cāgnihotraṃ ca sarvaṃ tad dhanino bhavet
śauṇḍikādyaṃ brāhmaṇas tu dāpanīyaḥ śanaiḥ śanaiḥ
ṛṇaṃ dharmādito grāhyaṃ yas tūpari na lekhayet
na caivopagataṃ dadyāt tasya tadvṛddhim āpnuyāt
ṛṇam evaṃvidhaṃ putrān jīvatām api dāpayet
sāṃnidhye 'pi pituḥ putrair ṛṇaṃ deyaṃ vibhāvitam
proṣitasya sutaḥ sarvaṃ pitryam aṃśaṃ mṛtasya tu
ekacchāyākṛtaṃ sarvaṃ dadyāt tu preṣite sutaḥ
mṛte pitari pitṛaṃśaṃ pararṇaṃ na kadācana
pitryam evāgrato deyaṃ paścād ātmīyam eva ca
tayoḥ paitāmahaṃ pūrvaṃ deyam evam ṛṇaṃ sadā
ṛṇam ātmīyavat pitryaṃ putrair deyaṃ vibhāvitam
paitāmahaṃ samaṃ deyam adeyaṃ tat sutasya tu
svadeśe vā videśe vā taṃ vidvān na vicālayet
ataḥ putrena jātena svārtham utsṛjya yatnataḥ
ṛṇāt pitā mocanīyo yathā na narakaṃ vrajet
pitary uparate putrā ṛṇaṃ dadyur yathāṃśataḥ
vibhaktā avibhaktā vā yo vā tām udvahed dhuram
adhiṣṭhātā ṛṇaṃ dāpyas tāsāṃ bhartṛkriyāsu tat
strīhārī tu tathaiva syād abhāve dhanahāriṇaḥ
yad gṛhītaṃ kuṭumbārthe tad gṛhī dātum arhati
ujjāmādikam ādāya svāmine na dadāti yaḥ
sa tasya dāsaḥ putraḥ strī paśuvī jāyate gṛhe
ṛṇaṃ putrakṛtaṃ pitrā śodhyaṃ yad anumoditam
sutasnehena vā dadyān nānyathā dātum arhati
phalabhogyaṃ pūrṇakālaṃ dattvā dravyaṃ tu sāmakam
yadi prakarṣitaṃ tat syāt tadā na dhanabhāgdhanī
ṛṇī ca na labhet bandhaṃ parasparamataṃ vinā
yo yāvan nihnuvītārthaṃ mithyā yāvati vādayet
tau nṛpeṇa hy adharmajñau dāpyau tad dviguṇaṃ damam
dharmyādinodgrāhya dhanaṃ yas tūpari na lekhayet
na caivopagataṃ dadyāt tasya tad vṛddhim āpnuyāt
mudrāṅkitaṃ ca yad dattaṃ tadopanidhikaṃ smṛtam
sthānaṃ gṛhaṃ sthalaṃ caiva tad ṛṇaṃ vividhān guṇān
satyaṃ śaucaṃ bandhujanaṃ parīkṣya sthāpayen nidhim
sa punar dvividhaḥ proktaḥ sākṣimānitaras tathā
tat syāt pālayato nyāsaṃ tathā ca śaraṇāgatam
bhartur drohe yathā nāryāḥ puṃsaḥ putrasuhṛdvadhe
doṣo bhavet tathā nyāse bhakṣitopekṣite nṛṇām
nyāsadravyaṃ na gṛhṇīyāt tannāśas tv ayaśaḥkaraḥ
sthāpitaṃ yena vidhinā yena yac ca vibhāvitam
yācyamāno na dadyād vā dāpyas tat sodayaṃ bhavet
nyāsadravyeṇa yaḥ kaścit sādhayet kāryam ātmanaḥ
daṇḍyaḥ sa rājño bhavati dāpyas tac cāpi sodayam
gṛhītvāpahnute yaś ca sākṣibhiḥ śapathena vā
vibhāvya dāpayen nyāsaṃ tat samaṃ vinayaṃ tathā
raho datte nidhau yatra visaṃvādaḥ prajāyate
vibhāvakaṃ tatra divyam ubhayor api ca smṛtam
mitho dāyaḥ kṛto yena gṛhīto mitha eva vā
mitha eva pradātavyo yathā dāyas tathā grahaḥ
samudre nāpnuyāt kiṃcid yadi tasmān na saṃharet
eṣa evodito dharmas tathā ca śaraṇāgate
yas tu saṃskriyate nyāso divasaiḥ pariniṣṭhitaiḥ
tad ūrdhva sthāpayañ śilpī dāpyo daivahato 'pi tat
śrūyatāṃ taṃ prayatnena saviśeṣaṃ bravīmy aham
na vidyate tatra doṣaḥ stena syād upadhikrayāt
antar gṛhe bahir grāmān niśāyām asato janāt
hīnamūlyaṃ ca yat krītaṃ jñeyo 'sāv upavikrayaḥ
pūrvasvāmī tu tad dravyaṃ yad āgatya vicārayet
tatra mūlyaṃ darśanīyaṃ kretuḥ śuddhis tato bhavet
mūlena saha vādas tu nāṣṭakasya vihīyate
kretre rājñe mūlyadaṇḍau pradadyāt svāmine dhanam
abhāvayaṃs tataḥ paścād dāpyaḥ syād dviguṇaṃ damam
avijñātāśrayāt krītaṃ vikretā yatra vā mṛtaḥ
svāmī dattvārdhamūlyaṃ tu prakṛhṇīta svakaṃ dhanam
ardhaṃ dvayor api hṛtaṃ tatra syād vyavahārataḥ
divā gṛhītaṃ satkretā samṛddho labhate dhanam
vikrīyorvīṃ tu yat kretur bhuktiṃ yo na [ca] sādhayet
sa tasmai tad dhanaṃ dadyād anyathā coradaṇḍabhāk
hānis tatra samā kalpyā kretṛnāstikayor dvayoḥ
āyavyayajñaiḥ śucibhiḥ śūraiḥ kuryāt saha kriyāḥ
samo 'tirikto jīno vā yatrāṃśo yasya yādṛśaḥ
kṣayavyayau tathā vṛddhis tasya tatra tathāvidhā
vaṇijyādyāḥ sahaitais tu na kartavyā budhaiḥ kriyāḥ
samo nyūno 'dhiko vāṃśo yena kṣiptas tathaiva saḥ
vyayaṃ dadyāt karma kuryāl lābhaṃ gṛhṇīta caiva hi
parīkṣakāḥ sākṣiṇaś ca ta evoktāḥ parasparam
yaḥ kaścid vañcakas teṣāṃ vijñātaḥ krayavikraye
śapathaiḥ sa viśodhyaḥ syāt sarvavāde tv ayaṃ vidhiḥ
sarveṣām eva sā proktā kalpanīyā tathāṃśataḥ
anirdiṣṭo vāryamāṇaḥ pramādād yas tu nāśayet
tenaiva tad bhaved deyaṃ sarveṣāṃ samavāyinām
rājñe dattvā tu ṣaḍbhāgaṃ labheraṃs te yatāṃśataḥ
tasya aṃśaṃ daśamaṃ dattvā gṛhnīyus te 'ṃśato 'param
śulkasthānaṃ vaṇik prāptaḥ śulkaṃ dadyād yathocitam
na tad vyabhicaret rājñāṃ balir eṣa prakīrtitaḥ
yas tu svaśaktyā rakṣet tu tasyāṃśo daśamaḥ smṛtaḥ
yadā tatra vaṇik kaścit pramīyeta pramādataḥ
yadā kaścit samāgacchet tadā rikthaharo naraḥ
svāmyaṃ vibhāvayed anyaiḥ sa tadā labdhum arhati
tryabdād ūrdhvaṃ tu nāgacched yatra svāmī kathaṃcana
tadā gṛhṇīta tad rājā brahmasvaṃ brāhmaṇāñ śrayet
tad bandhunā kriyā kāryā sarveṣāṃ sahakāribhiḥ
rathaṃ hared yathādhvaryur brahmādhāne ca vājinam
hotā nividvaraṃ cāśvam udgātā cāpyanaḥ kraye
trividhās te samākhyātā vartitavyaṃ tathaiva taiḥ
bahūnāṃ saṃmato yas tu dadyād eko dhanaṃ naraḥ
karaṇaṃ kārayed vāpi sarvair eva kṛtaṃ bhavet
svecchādeyaṃ hiraṇyaṃ tu rasadhānyaṃ tu sāvadhi
samavetais tu yad dattaṃ prārthanīyaṃ tathaiva tat
na yācate ca yaḥ kaścil lābhāt sa parihīyate
ye samāḥ syus tu taiḥ sārdhaṃ kṛṣiḥ kāryā vijānatā
prakṛṣṭaṃ ca kṛtaṃ kāle vāpayan phalam aśnute
kāṇaṃ khañjaṃ vinādadyāt bāhyaṃ prājñaḥ kṛṣīvalaḥ
saṃskartā tu kalābhijñaḥ śilpī prokto manīṣibhiḥ
saṃbhūya kurvatāṃ caiṣāṃ pramukho dvyaṃśam arhati
nartakānām eṣa eva dharmaḥ sadbhir udāhṛtaḥ
svāmyājñayā tu yaś cauraiḥ paradeśāt samāhṛtam
rājñe dattvā tu ṣaḍbhāgaṃ bhajeyus te yathāṃśataḥ
samarthas tu hared dvyaṃśaṃ śeṣāḥ sarve samāṃśinaḥ
pratiśrutaṃ tathānyasya na deyaṃ tv aṣṭadhā smṛtam
madhvāsvādo viṣaṃ paścād dātur dhamo 'nyathā bhavet
saptārāmād gṛhakṣetrād yad yat kṣetraṃ pracīyate
pitrā vātha svayaṃ prāptaṃ tad dātavyaṃ vivakṣitam
yad dravyaṃ tat svakaṃ deyam adeyaṃ syād ato 'nyathā
vibhaktā vāvibhaktā vā dāyādāḥ sthāvare samāḥ
śūdre samaguṇaṃ dānaṃ vaiśye tad dviguṇaṃ smṛtam
kṣatriye triguṇaṃ dānaṃ brāhmaṇe ṣaḍguṇaṃ smṛtam
śrotriye caiva sāhasram upādhyāye tu tad dvayam
ācārye triguṇaṃ jñeyam āhitāgniṣu tad dvayam
strīdhanaṃ strī svakulyebhyaḥ prayaccchettaṃ tu varjayet
madūrdhvam iti yad dattaṃ na tat sattvāvahaṃ bhavet
nandadattaṃ tathaitair yat tad adattaṃ prakīrtitam
kārye vādharmasaṃyukte svāmī tat punar āpnuyāt
abhyupetya tu śuśrūṣāṃ yas tāṃ na pratipadyate
kramaśaḥ kalpyate vādo bhṛtabhedatrayaṃ tv idam
nṛtyādikaṃ ca tatprāptaṃ kuryāt karma guror gṛhe
yo bhuṅkte paradāsīṃ tu sa jñeyo vaḍabābhṛtaḥ
karma tatsvāminaḥ kuryād yathānnena bhṛto naraḥ
uttamas tv āyudhīyo 'tra madhyamas tu kṛṣīvalaḥ
adhamo bhāravāhaḥ syād ity eṣa trividho bhṛtaḥ
āyudhī tūttamaḥ prokto madhyamas tu kṛṣīvalaḥ
jātasasyāt tathā kṣīrāt sa labheta na saṃśayaḥ
karmāpi dvividhaṃ proktam aśubhaṃ śubham eva ca
aśubhaṃ karma vijñeyaṃ śubham anyad ataḥ param
tad vṛttir gurudāreṣu guruputre tathaiva ca
atra purvaś caturvargo dāsatvān na vimucyate
sa jaghanyatamas tv eṣāṃ so 'pi dāsyān na mucyate
dāsenoḍhā tva[sva]dāsī yā so 'pi dāsītvam āpnuyāt
yasmād bhartā prabhus tasyāḥ svāmyadhīnaprabhur yataḥ
dāsīsutāś ca ye jātāḥ tasyāḥ patyā pareṇa vā
utpādako yadi svāmī na dāsīṃ kārayet prabhuḥ
bhaktāc chādabhṛtaḥ sīrād bhāgaṃ gṛṇīta pañcamam
bhṛtakas tu na kurvīta svāminaḥ śāṭhyam aṇv api
bhṛto 'nārto na kuryād yo darpāt karma yatheritam
sa daṇḍyaḥ kṛṣṇalānaṣṭau na deyaṃ cāsya vetanam
gṛhītavetanaḥ karma na karoti yadā bhṛtaḥ
samarthaś ced damaṃ dāpyo dviguṇaṃ tac ca vetanam

agṛhītavetanasya daṇḍaḥ
	    agṛhīte samaṃ dāpyo bhṛtai rakṣya upaskaraḥ
pratiśrutya na kuryād yaḥ sa kāryaḥ syād balād api
sa cen na kuryāt tatkarma prāpnuyād viṃśatiṃ damam
sa daṇḍyaḥ kṛṣṇalāny aṣṭau na deyaṃ cāsya vetanam
prabhuṇā viniyuktaḥ san bhṛtako vidadhāti yat
daivarājños tathā nyāye tathā rāṣṭrasya vibhrame
yat praṇaṣṭaṃ bhṛtaṃ vā syān na pālas tatra kilbiṣī
kṛte karmaṇi yaḥ svāmī na dadyād vetanaṃ bhṛteḥ
pāladoṣād vināśe tu pāle daṇḍo vidhīyate
āmantritā ca nāgacchet avācyā baḍabā smṛtā
voḍhum arhati gopas tāṃ vinayaṃ caiva rājani
sasyān nivārayed gās tu cīrṇe doṣadvayaṃ bhavet
svāmī śatadamaṃ dāpyaḥ pālas tāḍanam arhati
śadaś ca sadamaṃ cīrṇe samūle kārṣabhakṣite
eṣā hi svāmibhṛtyānāṃ vai kriyā parikīrtitā
āhṛtya sthāpayet tatra teṣāṃ vṛttiṃ prakalpayet
muktā bhāvyāś ca nṛpatir lekhayitvā svaśāsanaiḥ
nityaṃ naimittikaṃ kāmyaṃ śāntikaṃ pauṣṭikaṃ tathā
paurāṇāṃ karma kuryus te saṃdigdhe nirṇayaṃ tathā
bādhākāle tu sā kāryā dharmakārye tathaiva ca
tatropaśamanaṃ kāryaṃ sarvair naikena kena cit
viśvāsaṃ prathamaṃ kṛtvā kuryuḥ kāryāṇy anantaram

niyojyāniyojyāḥ
	    lubdhātivṛddhabālāś ca na kāryāḥ kāryacintakāḥ
sarvakāryapravīṇāś ca kartavyās tu mahat tamāḥ
dvau trayaḥ pañca vā kāryāḥ samūhahitavādinaḥ
kulāyanaṃ nirodhaś ca kāryam asmābhir aṃśataḥ
yat tv evaṃ likhitaṃ patraṃ dharmyā sā samayakriyā
pālanīyāḥ samarthais tu yaḥ samartho visaṃvadet
tatra bhedam upekṣāṃ vā yaḥ kaścit kurute naraḥ
yas tu sādhāraṇaṃ hiṃsyāt kṣipet traividyam eva vā
saṃvitkriyāṃ vihanyāc ca sa nirvāsyaḥ purāt tataḥ
taiḥ kṛtaṃ ca svadharmeṇa nigrahānugrahaṃ nṛṇām
tadrājño 'py anumantavyaṃ nisṛṣṭārthā hi te smṛtāḥ
bādhāṃ kuryur yad ekasya saṃbhūtā dveṣasaṃyutāḥ
mukhyaiḥ saha samūhānāṃ visaṃvādo yadā bhavet
tadā vicārayet rājā svamārge sthāpayec ca tān
te tadaṣṭaguṇaṃ dāpyā vaṇijaś ca palāyinaḥ
tato labheta yat kiṃcit sarveṣām eva tat samam
yatnaiḥ prāptaṃ rakṣitaṃ vā gaṇārthe vā paṇaṃ kṛtam
jaṅgamaṃ sthāvaraṃ caiva dravye dve samudāhṛte
krayakāle paṇyaśabda ubhayor api ca smṛtaḥ
tad eva dviguṇaṃ dāpyas tatsamaṃ vinayaṃ tathā
mattonmattena vikrīyaṃ hīnam ūlyaṃ bhayena vā
asvatantreṇa mūḍhena tyājyaṃ tasya punar bhavet
yo 'nyahaste tu vikrīya anyasmai tat prayacchati
so 'pi tad dviguṇaṃ dāpyo vinayaṃ tāvad eva tu
ato 'rvāk puṇyadoṣas tu yadi saṃjāyate kvacit
vikretuḥ pratideyaṃ tat kretā mūlyam avāpnuyāt
avijñātaṃ tu yat krītaṃ duṣṭaṃ paścād vibhāvitam
krītaṃ tat svāmine deyaṃ paṇyaṃ kāle 'nyathā na tu
parīkṣeta svayaṃ paṇyam anyeṣāṃ ca pradarśayet
parīksitaṃ bahumataṃ gṛhītvā na punas tyajet
praṣṭavyāḥ saṃnidhisthāś cet kretrā jñātyādayaḥ smṛtāḥ
anyathā cet kṛtaṃ karma jñātīcchāṃ darśayet tataḥ
anyathā cet krayo yaḥ syād anyagrāme tripakṣakam
sodarāś ca sapiṇḍāś ca sodakāś ca sagotriṇaḥ
sāmantā dhanikā grāhyāḥ saptaite yonayo matāḥ
krayasiddhes tu naiva syād vatsarāṇāṃ śatair api
jalamārgādi yat kiṃcid anyaiś caiva bṛhaspatiḥ
kṣetrādyupetaṃ paripakvasasyaṃ vṛkṣaṃ phalaṃ vāpy upabhogayogyam
kūpaṃ taḍākaṃ gṛham unnataṃ ca kretre ca vikretur idaṃ vadanti
yac cānucitamūlyaṃ syāt tat sarvaṃ vinivartayet
nārhanti te pratikroṣṭuṃ krāntaṃ pakṣatraye kramāt
tripakṣād atha vā māsāt tritayāt tu tad āpnuyāt
śālmalīśālatā[ḍāṃ? lāṃ]ś ca kṣīriṇaś caiva pādapān
gulmān veṇūṃś ca vividhāñ śamīvallīsthalāni ca
śarān kubjakagulmāṃś ca tathā sīmā na naśyati
yadi śūdro netā syāt taṃ klaibyenālaṃkāreṇa alaṃkṛtya śavabhasmanā /
mukhaṃ vilipyāgreyasya paśoḥ śoṇitenorasi pañcāṅgulāni kṛtvā grīvāyām /
antrāṇi pratimucya svyena pāṇinā sīmāloṣṭaṃ mūrdhni dhārayet //
yadi saṃśaya eva syāl liṅgānām api darśane
te pṛṣṭās tu yathā brūyuḥ sīmāsandhiṣu lakṣaṇam
tat tathā sthāpayet rājā dharmeṇa grāmayor dvayoḥ
sukṛtaiḥ śāpitāḥ svaiḥ svaiḥ brūyus te tu samaṃjasam
nibadhnīyāt tathā sīmāṃ savīṃs tāṃś caiva nāmataḥ
nihitāni tathānyāni yāni bhūmir na bhakṣayet
vārdhake ca śiśūnāṃ te darśayeyus tathaiva ca
ekatra kūlapātaṃ tu bhūmer anyatra saṃsthitiḥ
kṣetraṃ sasasyam ullaṅghya bhūmiś cchinnā yadā bhavet
yā rājñā krodhalobhena balān nyāyena vā hṛtā
āgamaṃ ca pramāṇaṃ ca bhogaṃ kāmaṃ ca nāma ca
bhūbhāgalakṣaṇaṃ caiva ye vidus te 'tra sākṣiṇaḥ
pradattānyasya tuṣṭena na sā siddhim avāpnuyāt
[yā rājñā krodhalobhena chalān nyāyena vā hṛtā]
pramāṇarahitāṃ bhūmiṃ bhuñjato yasya yā hṛtā
guṇādhikasya dattā vā tasya tāṃ naiva cālayet
śāpathaiḥ śāpitāḥ svaiḥ svaiḥ brūyuḥ sīmni viniścayam
darśayeyur nidhānāni tat pramāṇam iti sthitiḥ
[sāmantāś cen mṛṣā brūyuḥ setau vivadatāṃ nṛṇām]
[sarve ca te pṛthagdaṇḍyā rājñā madhyam asāhasam]
[viparītaṃ nayantas tu dāpyāḥ syur dviśataṃ damam]
sarvasmin sthāvare vāde vidhir eṣa prakīrtitaḥ
maulās te tu samuddiṣṭāḥ praṣṭavyāḥ kāryanirṇaye
aduṣṭās te tu yad brūyuḥ saṃdigdhau samavṛttayaḥ
tat pramāṇaṃ tu kartavyam evaṃ dharmo na hīyate
anyathā tu bhavel lābho narāṇāṃ rājadaivikaḥ
nadyotsṛṣṭā rājadattā yasya tasyaiva sā mahī
anyathā tu bhavel lābho narāṇāṃ rājadaivikaḥ
tasmāt sarveṣu kāleṣu tatkṛtaṃ na vicālayet
grāmayor ubhayor yatra maryādā kalpitā nadī
kṣayodayena cālpā ca cālayan daṇḍam arhati
viṣamāṃ nṛpatiḥ kuryāc cihnaiḥ sīmāṃ viniścitām
yena yāvad yathā bhuktaṃ tasya tan na vicālayet
praṇālīṃ gṛhavāstuṃ ca pīḍayan daṇḍabhāg bhavet

gṛhanirmāṇe 'kāryāṇi
	    dṛṣṭipātaṃ praṇālīṃ ca na kuryāt paraveśmani
yānty āyānti janā yena paśavaś cānivāritāḥ
tad ucyate saṃsaraṇaṃ na roddhavyaṃ tu kenacit
yas tatra saṃkaraṃ śvabhraṃ vṛkṣāropaṇam eva ca
kāmāt purīṣaṃ kuryāc ca tasya daṇḍas tu māṣakaḥ
akurvan svāmine dāpyo madhyaṃ kṛṣṭaśadaṃ tu saḥ
kṣetraṃ gṛhītvā yaḥ kaścin na kuryān na ca kārayet
svāmine sa śadaṃ dāpyo rājñe daṇḍaṃ ca tatsamam
susaṃskṛte tu ṣaṣṭhaṃ syāt parikalpya yathāvidhi
apriyoktis tāḍanaṃ ca pāruṣyaṃ dvividhaṃ smṛtam
ekaikaṃ tu tridhā bhinnaṃ damaś coktas trilakṣaṇaḥ
dravyaṃ vinā tu prathamaṃ vākpāruṣyaṃ tad ucyate
samānayoḥ samo daṇḍo nyūnasya dviguṇas tu saḥ
patitaṃ patitety uktvā coraṃ coreti vā punaḥ
taptam āsiñcayet tailaṃ vaktre śrotre ca pārthivaḥ
tadardhaṃ kṣatriyo vaiśyaṃ kṣipan vinayam arhati
vaiśyam ākṣārayañ śūdro dāpyaḥ syāt prathamaṃ damam
ākrośakas tu viprāṇāṃ jihvāc chedena daṇḍyate
vākpāruṣye kṛte yasya yathā daṇḍo vidhīyate
tasyaiva dviguṇaṃ daṇḍaṃ kārayen maraṇād ṛte
dvayoḥ praharator daṇḍaḥ samayos tu samaḥ smṛtaḥ
ārambhako 'nubandhī ca dāpyaḥ syād adhikaṃ damam
sa eva tāḍayaṃs tasya nānveṣṭavyo mahībhujā
eṣa daṇḍaḥ sameṣūktaḥ parastrīṣv adhikeṣu ca
kāryaḥ kṛtānurūpas tu lagne ghāte damo budhaiḥ
tvagbhede prathamo daṇḍo māṃsabhede tu madhyamaḥ

uttamam
	    uttamas tv asthibhede syād dhātena tu pramāpaṇam
kartavyo madhyamo daṇḍo dviguṇaḥ patiteṣu tu
chedane cottamo daṇḍo bhedane madhyamo guruḥ
vivikte tāḍito yas tu hato dṛśyeta vā bhavet
hantā tad anumānena vijñeyaḥ śapathena vā
antarveśmany araṇye vā niśāyāṃ yatra tāḍitaḥ
śoṇitaṃ tatra dṛśyeta na pṛcchet tatra sākṣiṇaḥ
kaścit kṛtvātmanaś cihnaṃ dveṣāt param abhidravet
prātilomyās tathā cāntyāḥ puruṣāṇāṃ malāḥ smṛtāḥ
brāhmaṇātikrame vadhyā na dātavyā dhanaṃ kvacit
śrāntān kṣudhārtān tṛṣitān akāle vāhayet tu yaḥ
sa goghno niṣkṛtiṃ kāryo dāpyo vāpy athavā damam
samutthānavyayaṃ dāpyaḥ kalahāya kṛtaṃ ca yat
chettavyaṃ tad bhavet tasya manunā samudāhṛtam
prakāśāś cāprakāśāś ca taskarā dvividhā smṛtāḥ
dhānyahartā daśaguṇaṃ dāpyaḥ syād dviguṇaṃ damam
bahūnāṃ bhavati kṣemaḥ tasya puṇyaprado vadhaḥ
tathā pāntham uṣo vṛkṣe gale badhvāvalambayet
ajñātauṣadhimantras tu yaś ca vyādher atattvavit
rogibhyo 'rthaṃ samādatte sa daṇḍyaś coravad bhiṣak
gaṇakā vañcakāś caiva daṇḍyās te kitavā smṛtāḥ
paṇye tad dviguṇaṃ dāpyo vaṇigdaṇḍaṃ ca tatsamam
viśvastavañcakāś caiva nirvāsyāḥ sarva eva te
jyotir jñānaṃ tathotpātam aviditvā tu ye nṛṇām
hiṃsantaś cchadmanā nṛṇāṃ vadhyās te rājapūruṣaiḥ
kretre mūlyaṃ pradāpyās te rājñā tad dviguṇaṃ damam
sākṣiṇaś cānyathā brūyur dāpyās te dviguṇaṃ damam
mūlakarma ca kurvanti nirvāsyās te mahībhujā
sandhicchedo hṛtaṃ tyājyāḥ śūlam āropayet tataḥ
tathā pāntham uṣo vṛkṣe gale baddhvāvalambayet
gohartur nāsikāṃ chindyāt badhvā vāmbhasi majjayet
śeṣeṣv ekādaśaguṇaṃ dāpyas tasya ca taddhanam
dhānyahārī daśaguṇaṃ dāpyas tad dviguṇaṃ damam
tṛṇaṃ vā yadi vā kāṣṭhaṃ puṣpaṃ vā yadi vā phalam
svāmine tad dhanaṃ dāpyaḥ prāyaścittaṃ na kāryate
pāruṣyam ubhayaṃ caiva sāhasaṃ tu caturvidham
imān dharmān kaliyuge varjyān āhur manīṣiṇaḥ
hiṃsayaṃś cauravad dāpyo dviśatodyaṃ damaṃ tathā
sāhasaṃ pañcadhā proktaṃ vadhas tatrādhikaḥ smṛtaḥ
jñātvā samyagdhanaṃ hṛtvā hantavyāḥ vividhair vadhaiḥ
lobhād bhayād vā yo rājā na hanty anyāyakāriṇaḥ
tasya prakṣubhyate rāṣṭraṃ rājyāc ca parihīyate
krodhādinā nimittena naraḥ sāhasikas tu saḥ
marmaprahārado yas tu ghātakaḥ sa udāhṛtaḥ
marmaghātī tu yas teṣāṃ yathoktaṃ dāpayed damam
yo na hanyād vadhaprāptaṃ so 'śvamedhaphalaṃ labhet
svādhyāyinaṃ kule jātaṃ yo hanyād ātatāyinam
ahatvā bhrūṇahā sa syān na hatvā bhrūṇahā bhavet

ghātakādarśane nirṇayaḥ
	    kṣatasyālpam ahatvaṃ ca marmasthānaṃ ca yatnataḥ
sāmarthyaṃ cānubandhaṃ ca jñātvā cihnaiḥ prasādayet
hatas tu dṛśyate yatra ghātakaś ca na dṛśyate
samaghātī tu yas teṣāṃ yathoktaṃ dāpayed damam
gṛhītaḥ śaṅkayā yas tu na tat kāryaṃ prapadyate
divyair viśuddho medhyaḥ syād aśuddho vadham arhati
nigrahānugrahair rājñaḥ kīrtir dharmaś ca vardhate
pāruṣyaṃ dvividhaṃ proktaṃ sāhasaṃ ca dvilakṣaṇam
tat punas trividhaṃ proktaṃ prathamaṃ madhyamottamam
pralapantyā vā rahasi balāt kārakṛtaṃ tu tat
chadmanā gṛham ānīya dattvā vā madyakārmaṇam
tat punas trividhaṃ proktaṃ prathamaṃ madhyamottamam
saṃbhāṣaṇaṃ ca rahasi madhyamaṃ saṃgrahaṃ viduḥ
saṃbhāṣaṇaṃ ca rahasi madhyamaṃ saṃgrahaṃ viduḥ
trayāṇām api caiteṣāṃ prathamo madhya uttamaḥ
parapatnyā tu puruṣaḥ saṃbhāṣāṃ yojayan rahaḥ
chadmanā kāmayed yas tu tasya sarvaharo damaḥ
damo neyaḥ sabhāyāṃ yo hīnāyām adhikas tataḥ
gṛham āgatya yā nārī pralobhya sparśanādinā
kāmayet tatra sā daṇḍyā narasyārdhadamaḥ smṛtaḥ
anicchantī tu yā bhuktā guptāṃ tāṃ vāsayed gṛhe
kārayen niṣkṛtiṃ kṛcchraṃ parākaṃ vā same gatām
hīnavarṇopabhuktā yā tyājyā vadhyātha vā bhavet
svakāme vartamānā tu yā snehān na nivāritā
avaśyā sā bhavet paścād yathā vyādhir upekṣitā
aprayacchan pitā kāle patiś cānupayann ṛtau
putraś cābhaktado mātuḥ gārhyo daṇḍyaś ca dharmataḥ
saṃpadaś ca prajāḥ śuddhāḥ kriyā ca saphalā bhavet
śauce 'gnikārye saṃyojyāḥ strīṇāṃ śuddhir iyaṃ smṛtā
sā bhartṛlokān āpnoti sadbhiḥ sādhvīti cocyate
bhartrā pitrā sutair na strī viyuktānyagṛhe vaset
asatsaṅge viśeṣeṇa garhyatām eti sā dhruvam
ārtārte mudite hṛṣṭā proṣite malinā kṛśā
mrte mriyeta yā patyau sā strī jñeyā pativratā
māṃsamadyābhiyogaṃ ca na kuryāt proṣite prabhau
anvārūḍhā jīvatī[ntī] ca sādhvī bhartur hittaya sā
uktvā niyogo manunā niṣiddhaḥ svayam eva tu
dvāpare ca kalau nṛṇāṃ śaktihānir vinirmitā
dadāti dīyate pitrā putrebhyaḥ svasya yad dhanam
ekāṃ strīṃ kārayet karma yathāṃśena gṛhe gṛhe
bahvyaḥ samāṃśato deyā dāsānām apy ayaṃ vidhiḥ
ekaṃ bhaved dvibhaktānāṃ tad eva syād gṛhe gṛhe
sāksitvaṃ pratibhāvyaṃ ca dānaṃ grahaṇam eva ca
yeṣām etāḥ kriyā loke pravartante svarikthiṣu
vibhaktān avagaccheyuḥ lekhyam apy antareṇa tān
mātur nivṛtte rajasi prattasu bhaginīṣu ca
paitṛke na vibhāgārhāḥ sutāḥ pitur anicchayā
samavarṇāsu ye jātāḥ sarve putrā dvijanmanām
uddhāraṃ jyāyase dattvā bhajerann itare samam
vayovidyātapobhiś ca dvyaṃśaṃ hi labhate dhanam
yathā yathā vibhāgāptaṃ dhanaṃ yāgārthatām iyāt
samam aṃśitvam ākhyātaṃ pituḥ putrasya caiva hi
tathaiva te pālanīyā vineyās te syur anyathā
samavetais tu yat prāptaṃ sarve tatra samāṃśinaḥ
yasyeha prathitā kīrtitaḥ pitaras tena putriṇaḥ
samāṃśabhāginas tv anye teṣāṃ pitṛsamas tu saḥ
samāṃśā mātaras teṣāṃ turīyāṃśā ca kanyakā
kanyakānāṃ tv adattānāṃ caturtho bhāga iṣyate
putrāṇāṃ ca trayo bhāgāḥ sāmyaṃ tv alpadhane smṛtam
savarṇā bhinnasaṃkhyā ye puṃbhāgas teṣu śasyate
pitāmahyas tu sarvās tā mātṛtulyāḥ prakīrtitāḥ
asaṃskṛtās tu yās tatra paitṛkād eva tā dhanāt
saṃskāryā bhrātṛbhir jyeṣṭhaḥ kanyakāś ca yathāvidhi
asaṃskṛtā bhrātaras tu ye syus tatra yavīyasaḥ
saṃskāryāḥ pūrvajais te vai paitṛkān madhyagād dhanāt
dadyād dhanaṃ ca paryāptaṃ kṣetrāṃśaṃ vā yad icchati
ūḍhayā kanyayā vāpi bhartuḥ pitṛgṛhe 'pi vā
bhrātuḥ sakāśāt pitror vā labdhaṃ saudāyikaṃ smṛtam
saudāyikaṃ dhanaṃ prāpya strīṇāṃ svātantram iṣyate
vikraye caiva dāne ca yatheṣtaṃ sthāvareṣv api
strīdhanaṃ syād apatyānāṃ duhitā ca tadaṃśinī
aprattā cet samūḍhā tu labhate mānamātrakam
yad āsām auraso na syāt putro dauhitra eva vā
tat suto vā dhanaṃ tāsāṃ svastrīyād yāḥ samāpnuyuḥ
savarṇajo 'py aguṇavān nārhaḥ syāt paitṛke dhane
tatpiṇḍadāḥ śrotriyā ye teṣāṃ tat tu vidhīyate
atas tu viparītena tena nāsti prayojanam
tayā gavā kiṃ kriyate yā na dogdhrī na garbhiṇī
ko 'rthaḥ putreṇa jātena yo na vidvān na dhārmikaḥ
sthāvaradvipadaṃ caiva yady api svayam ārhitam
asambhūya sutān sarvān na dānaṃ na ca vikrayaḥ
jātā janiṣyad garbhasthāḥ pitṛsthā ye ca mānavāḥ
sarve kāṃkṣanti tāṃ vṛttim anācchedyās tatas tu sā
śūdryāṃ dvijātibhir jāto na bhūmer bhāgam arhati
dvijātir āpnuyāt sarvam iti dharmo vyavasthitaḥ
teṣāṃ savarṇā ye putrās te tṛtīyāṃśabhāginaḥ
sarve hy anaurasasyaite putrā dāyaharāḥ smṛtāḥ
aurase punar utpanne teṣu jyaiṣṭhyaṃ na tiṣṭhati
pitāmahapitṛbhyāṃ ca dattaṃ mātrā ca yad bhavet
vastrādayo 'vibhājyā yair uktaṃ tair na vicāritam
pracāraś ca yathāṃśena kartavyo rikthibhiḥ sadā
brahmadāyaṃ gatāṃ bhūmiṃ hared yo brāhmaṇīsutaḥ
gṛhaṃ dvijātayaḥ sarve tathā kṣetraṃ kramāgatam
pitrā saha vibhaktā ye sāpatnā vā sahodarāḥ
jaghanyāś caiva ye teṣāṃ pitṛbhāgaharās tu te
putraiḥ saha vibhaktena pitrā yat svayam ārjitam
vibhaktajasya tat sarvam anīśāḥ pūrvajāḥ smṛtāḥ
yathā dhane tathā rṇe ca dānādānakrayeṣu ca
paitāmahaṃ hṛtaṃ pitrā svaśaktyā yad upārjitam
pradānaṃ svecchayā kuryāt bhogaṃ caiva tato dhanāt
patyau jīvati yaḥ strībhir alaṃkāro dhṛto bhavet
na taṃ bhajeran dāyādāḥ bhajamānāḥ patanti te
kṛte 'kṛte vā vibhāge rikthī yatra pravartate
sāmānyaṃ ced bhāvayati tatra bhāgaharas tu saḥ
ṛṇaṃ lekhyaṃ gṛhaṃ kṣetraṃ yasya paitāmahaṃ bhavet
ardhatas tv āgatasyāṃśaḥ pradātavyo na saṃśayaḥ
tṛtīyaḥ pañcamaś caiva saptamo yo 'pi vā bhavet
yaṃ paraṃparayā maulāḥ samastāḥ svāminaṃ viduḥ
bhūyo dāyavibhāgaḥ syād ācaturthād iti sthitiḥ
anekadhā kṛtāḥ putrā ṛṣibhiś ca purātanaiḥ
eka evaurasaḥ pitrye dhane svāmī prakīrtitaḥ
tat tulyaḥ putrikaputro bhartavyās tv apare smṛtāḥ
datto 'paviddhaḥ krītaś ca kṛtaḥ śaudras tathaiva ca
jātiśuddhā madhyamās te sarve rikthasutāḥ smṛtāḥ
kṣetrajo garhitaḥ sadbhis tathā paunarbhavaḥ sutaḥ
kānīnaś ca sahoḍhaś ca gūḍhajaḥ putrikāsutaḥ
śūdrāputraḥ svayaṃdatto ye caite krītakāḥ smṛtāḥ
sarve te maitriṇaḥ proktā kāṇḍapṛṣṭhā na saṃśayaḥ
svakulaṃ pṛṣṭhataḥ kṛtvā yo vai parakulaṃ vrajet
anye tv āhur aputrasya cintitā putrikā bhavet
putrās trayodaśa proktā manunā yena pūrvaśaḥ
ājyaṃ vinā yathā tailaṃ sadbhiḥ pratinidhiḥ smṛtam
yady ekajātā bahavo bhrātaras tu sahodarāḥ
ekasyāpi sute jāte sarve te putriṇaḥ smṛtāḥ
bahvīnām ekapatnīnām eṣa eva vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ
ekā cet putriṇī tāsāṃ sarvāsāṃ piṇḍadas tu saḥ
punnāmno narakāt putraḥ pitaraṃ trāyate yataḥ
rikthe ca piṇḍadāne ca samau tau parikīrtitau
saṃmānamātraṃ prete pitari dadyuḥ śuśrūṣuś cet
dhanaṃ vyapohya tac chiṣṭaṃ dāyādānāṃ prakalpayet
tadabhāve pitā mātā bhrātā putrāś ca kīrtitāḥ
aputreṇa sutaḥ kāryo yādṛk tādṛk prayatnataḥ
gayāṃ yāsyati yaḥ kaścit so 'smān saṃtārayiṣyati
yathā jalaṃ kuplavena taran majjati mānavaḥ
tadvat pitā kuputreṇa tamasy andhe nimajjati
āmnāye smṛtitantre ca lokācāre ca sūribhiḥ
yasya noparatā bhāryā dehārdhaṃ tasya jīvati
vindet pativratā nārī dharma eṣa sanātanaḥ
mūrvaṃ mrtā hared agnim anvārūḍhā hared agham
putrābhāve tu patnī syāt patnyabhāve tu sodaraḥ
tadabhāve tu dāyādaḥ paścād dauhitrakaṃ dhanam
vṛttasthāpi kṛte 'py aṃśe na strī sthāvaram arhati
vidhavā yauvanasthā cen nārī bhavati karkaśā
āyuṣaḥ kṣapaṇārthaṃ tu dātavyaṃ jīvanaṃ tadā
krayakrītā tu yā nārī saṃbhogārthaṃ sutārthinā
gṛhītā vānyadīyā vā saiva strī parikīrtyate
pradadyāt tv eva piṇḍaṃ vā kṣetrāṃśaṃ vā yadṛcchayā
sthāvarāj jīvanaṃ strībhyo yad dattaṃ śvaśureṇa tu
na tac chakyam apāhartuṃ itaraiḥ śvaśure mrte
sapiṇḍā bāndhavā ye tu tasyāḥ syuḥ paripanthinaḥ
hiṃsyur dhanāni tān rājā cauradaṇḍeṇa ghātayet
saṃsṛṣṭau yau punaḥ prītyā tau parasparabhāginau
vibhaktā bhrātaro ye tu saṃprītyaikatra saṃsthitāḥ
punar vibhāgakaraṇe teṣāṃ jyaiṣṭhyaṃ na vidyate
kadācid vā pramīyeta pravrajed vā kathaṃcana
na lupyate tasya bhāgaḥ sodarasya vidhīyate
yā tasya bhaginī sā tu tato 'ṃśaṃ labdhum arhati
sā ca dattā tv adattā vā sodare tu mṛte sati
tasyāṃśaṃ tu haret saiva dvayor vyaktaṃ hi kāraṇam
anantaraḥ sapiṇḍād yas tasya tasya dhanaṃ bhavet
sarve sapiṇḍās tad dāyaṃ vibhajeran yathāṃśataḥ
saṃsṛṣṭānāṃ tu yaḥ kaścid vidyā śauryādinā dhanam
prāpnoti tasya dātavyo dvyaṃśaḥ śeṣāḥ samāṃśinaḥ
vibhakto yaḥ punaḥ pitrā bhrātrā caikatra saṃsthitaḥ
pitṛvyeṇāthavā prītyā tat saṃsṛṣṭaḥ sa ucyate
sodaryā vibhajeraṃs taṃ sametya sahitāḥ samam
bhrātaro ye ca saṃsṛṣṭā bhaginyaś ca sanābhayaḥ
mriyetānyataro vāpi tasya bhāgo na lupyate
dadyāc cāpaharec cāṃśaṃ jātasya ca mṛtasya ca
anyodaryas tu saṃsṛṣṭī nānyodaryād dhanaṃ haret
teṣāṃ dhanaharo rājā sarvasyādhipatir hi saḥ
bhavet samāṃśaḥ kṣatreṇa vaiśyājātas tathaiva ca
yady apy eṣām pitā dadyān mṛte viprāsuto haret
śūdryāṃ dvijātibhir jāto na bhūmer bhāgam arhati
sajātāv āpnuyāt sarvam iti dharmo vyavasthitaḥ
niṣāda ekaputras tu viprasya sa tṛtīyabhāk
dvau sakulyāḥ sapiṇḍā vā svadhādātātha saṃharet
kulyābhāve svadhādātā ācāryaḥ śiṣya eva vā
sarvāsv āpatsu tān varṇāṃs tathaiva pratipādayet
bhartur dhanaharī patnī tāṃ vinā duhitā smṛtā
aṅgād aṅgāt saṃbhavati putravad duhitā nṛṇām
tasmāt pitṛdhanaṃ tv anyaḥ kathaṃ gṛhṇīta mānavaḥ
tadabhāve tu duhitā yady anūḍhā bhavet tadā
yathaivātmā tathā putraḥ putreṇa duhitā samā
tasyām ātmani tiṣṭhanti katham anyo dhanaṃ haret
pumān puṃso 'dhike śukle strī bhavaty adhike striyāḥ
kṛtākṛtā vā putrasya pitur dhanaharī tu sā
yathā pitṛdhane svāmyaṃ tasyāḥ satsv api bandhuṣu
sakulyā bāndhavāḥ śiṣyāḥ śrotriyāś ca dhanārhakāḥ
mātā rikthaharī jñeyā bhrātā vā tadanujñayā
putrābhāve tu patnī syāt patnyabhāve tu sodaraḥ
tadabhāve tu dāyādaḥ paścād dauhitrakaṃ dhanam
samutpannād dhanād ardhaṃ tadarthaṃ sthāpayet prthak
bahavo jñātayo yatra sakulyā bāndhavās tathā
yas tv āsannataras teṣāṃ so 'napatyadhanaṃ haret
bhrātā vā bhrātṛputro vā sapiṇḍaḥ śiṣya eva vā
saha piṇḍakriyāṃ kṛtvā kuryād abhyudayaṃ tataḥ
māyāvino dhṛtadhanāḥ krūrā lubdhāś ca ye narāḥ
saṃprītyā sādhanīyās te svārthahānyā chalena vā
anumānena vijñeyaṃ na syur yatra ca sākṣiṇaḥ
teṣām etāḥ kriyā loke pravartante svarikthiṣu
vibhaktān avagaccheyur lekhyam apy antareṇa tān
vaṇikpathaṃ ca ye kuryur vibhaktās te na saṃśayaḥ
yenāṃśo yādṛśo bhuktas tasya taṃ na vicālayet
sabhiko grāhakas tatra dadyāj jetre nṛpāya ca
tat svāminā paṇo deyo yas tatra parikalpitaḥ
mocyo 'bhijño 'pi sarvasvam jitaṃ sarvaṃ na dāpyate
gaṇanāvañcakāś caiva daṇḍyās te kitavāḥ smṛtāḥ
vyāpādane tu tatkārī vadhaṃ citram avāpnuyāt
sa eva sākṣī saṃdigdhau sabhyaiś cānyais tribhir vṛtaḥ
ubhayor api saṃdigdhaṃ kitavās tu parīkṣakāḥ
yadā vidveṣiṇas te tu tadā rājā vicārayet
evaṃ vādikṛtān vādān prapaśyet pratyahaṃ nṛpaḥ
nṛpāśrayās tathā cānye vidvadbhir brāhmaṇaiḥ saha
tatsvāminā paṇo deyo yas tatra parikalpitaḥ
vāgdhigdaṇḍaṃ vadhaṃ caiva caturdhā kalpitaṃ damam
suvarṇaśatam ekaṃ tu vadhārho daṇḍam arhati
vedhenāpi yadā tv etān nigṛhītuṃ na śaknuyāt
tadaiṣu sarvam apy etat prayuñjīta catuṣṭayam
tṛtīyaṃ dhanadaṇḍaṃ tu vadhadaṇḍam ataḥ param
daśamāṃśaṃ hared arthaṃ pañcamaṃ sarvam eva vā
ṣaḍbhāgas taraśulkaṃ ca gate deyas tathaiva ca
prakṛtīnāṃ prakopaś ca saṃketaś ca parasparam
svavācaiva jitānāṃ tu noktaḥ paunarbhāvo vidhiḥ
manvarthaviparītā yā smṛtiḥ sā na praśasyate
